event.name: A Dead 'Ard Weapon
event.flavor: These dirty but well-fashioned weapons were scavenged from who knows where. Some have crude runes or sigils cut into them, and they all look lethal.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 to see what has been found: 1 A halberd (BE) 2 A warhammer (BDE) 3 An axe (BD) 4 A flail (BD) 5 A mace (BD 6 A sword (BDEW) Which... Croll 1D6): 1 Causes +1 Wound per Battle-level. 2 Ignores 1D6 points of Armour. 3 Gives the wielder +1 To Hit. 4 Gives the wielder +1 Attack. 5 Gives the wielder the Parry 6+ ability. 6 Causes +1D6 Wounds on a To Hit roll of 6. Now roll again. If the roll is higher than the first score to see what the weapon does, the weapon has the second ability as well and so on. Each ability adds 200 gold to the weapon's value. ROLEPLAYING GAME ONLY PERMANENT

event.name: Abandoned Backpack
event.flavor: This scruffy-looking backpack is of the kind often used by adventurers.
event.rules: In the backpack there are 1D3 items of Dungeon Room Treasure. The Warrior who gets this card can Keep all 1D3 items for themselves, and they only count as one item for the purposes of divvying out Treasure. USE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Amulet of Anurandel
event.flavor: Anurandel was a Wood Elf Sorceress, renowned for her peaceful demeanour, sunny disposition and hatred of battle. She fashioned many items to aid her followers should they be assailed by dark forces.
event.rules: When a Warrior invokes the power of this amulet, Monsters only hit the wearer on a natural To Hit roll of 6. After the first successful hit, the amulet's power wanes and Monsters will hit as normal. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Amulet of Charadris
event.flavor: Charadris was a Priest of Sigmar who abhorred magic in all its forms, believing that his faith in Sigmar was the greatest power of all.
event.rules: Any Undead Monsters with the Regenerate ability adjacent to the Warrior wearing this amulet may only regenerate half the number of Wounds they normally would (rounded down). PERMANENT

event.name: Amulet of Fury
event.rules: At the heart of this crystal amulet a magical fire rages. This amulet allows a Warrior who is not a Wizard to cast a spell. Take one of the Wizard's Starting Spell Cards at random. The Warrior may try to cast the spell once per Turn, rolling equal to or over its Casting Number on 1D6 to do so. After successful use, the amulet disintegrates. DISCARD AFTER SUCCESSFUL USE

event.name: Amulet of Power
event.flavor: This ornate amulet throbs dully, and a thick, black liquid appears to flow within its core.
event.rules: At the start of each Warriors' Phase the bearer may roll 1D6. If the score is a 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6, they get +2 Strength for the rest of the Turn. If the score is a 1, the amulet explodes causing 1D6 Wounds to the bearer, with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. LASTS UNTIL EXPLODES

event.name: Amulet of Vindication
event.flavor: This antiquated porcelain amulet is covered in a layer of cracked and peeling black leather.
event.rules: This amulet allows the Warrior to counter hostile magic. Each time a spell is cast against the bearer of the amulet, roll 1D6. On a score 6 the spell has no effect on them (RPG: A Warrior wearing this amulet gains the Magic Resistance 6+ ability). PERMANENT

event.name: Ancient Manuscript
event.flavor: These ancient documents are faded and somewhat fragile.
event.rules: A Warrior who reads these documents must roll 1D6 to see what they reveal: 1 A recipe for Halfling pie. 2 A very old letter from a noble, worth 10 gold. 3 A musical masterpiece from a famous bard, worth 25 gold. 4 Battleplans from ages past, worth 50 gold. 5 A religious text, worth 100 gold. 6 A Treasure Map that leads to 500 gold! (RPG: The Warrior must add two extra weeks of travel to a Settlement after which they uncover the gold.) DISCARD AFTER SALE OR USE

event.name: Ancient Vase of Lustria
event.flavor: Lustria is a land of the unknown, the undiscovered continent, a realm of Giants and Daemons and powers beyond all telling.
event.rules: This vase is of strange design, unsuitable for use by Humans, Elves or Dwarfs. Its purpose can only be guessed at, as can its age, but its beauty and value is beyond question. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Arkal's Powder
event.flavor: This silver dust swirls in its casket as if shifted by an unseen finger.
event.rules: A Warrior who consumes this powder has their movement increased. They may immediately move another 3D6 squares, and automatically Escape from Pinning. Arkal's Powder may be consumed at any time. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Armour of Fortune
event.flavor: This armour gleams in a rainbow of never-ending array of carnage and war.
event.rules: This armour can absorb Wounds inflicted on the Warrior. Once donned, the armour cannot be removed. It can absorb a total of 30 Wounds, then explodes, taking the wearer to zero Wounds (and death if no healing is possible). LASTS UNTIL EXPLODES

event.name: Arrow of Slaying
event.flavor: A thick black liquid drips ominously from the end of this arrow. The magical venom on this arrow can fell even the toughest monster.
event.rules: If this arrow hits a Monster, roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 the arrow causes normal Damage. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 the Monster is immediately slain. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Arrows of Death
event.flavor: The shafts of these jet-black arrows are encrusted with golden runes and their tips glow with a pale green light.
event.rules: These enchanted arrows are magically sharpened and cause +3 Wounds when they hit. There are 1D6 Arrows of Death. Each arrow can only be used once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Arrows of Piercing
event.flavor: These magically sharpened white arrows are able to pierce the toughest armour at a thousand paces.
event.rules: A Warrior using these arrows must roll 1D6 after each successful hit. On a score of 5 or 6 (6 if the Armour is magical) the arrow ignores the target's Armour when determining Damage. There are enough arrows to last one Adventure. LASTS FOR ONE ADVENTURE

event.name: Arrows of Sure Flight
event.flavor: These arrows were skillfully crafted by the Wood Elves of Athel
event.rules: Loren. Arrows of Sure Flight may only be used to their full effect by an Elf. When used by any other Warrior treat them as normal arrows. An Elf using these arrows gets +1 To Hit. There are 2D6 arrows. Each arrow can only be used once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Axe of Damnation
event.flavor: This axe retains a drop of blood from every foe the wielder has defeated.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this axe gets +1 Attack. PERMANENT

event.name: Axe of Retribution
event.flavor: This axe of Dwarf origin was created to punish foes for crimes they have committed.
event.rules: A Warrior using this axe gets +1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Axe of Slaughter
event.flavor: This axe was forged by the Dwarf Runesmith Garvan
event.rules: Surehammer, who honed its blade to an impossible sharpness. This axe causes +1D6 Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Backpack
event.flavor: This rugged backpack is of the kind favoured by those who venture into dangerous places.
event.rules: The Backpack contains 1D6 sets of Provisions. Each set of Provisions restores 2 Wounds. (RPG: At the end of each Adventure, any remaining provisions in the Backpack are lost. However, at the start of the next Adventure, the Backpack will have magically replenished itself, and will contain 1D6 Provisions again!) 1D6 PROVISIONS PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Bag of Gold
event.flavor: This decaying bag is tied with a leather thong. Inside of it is a number of gold pieces.
event.rules: The bag contains 1D6x25 gold. RECORD THEN DISCARD

event.name: Band of Magic
event.flavor: This slender gold band glitters with a clear light.
event.rules: When a Warrior finds this ring, randomly select two Attack Spells (RPG: randomly select two Attack spells with Casting Numbers that are equivalent to the Warrior's Battle-level). These two spells are stored in the magic band. Each Spell may be cast once, automatically, whenever the wearer wishes. When both spells have been cast, the magic power of the band has been used up and it crumbles to dust. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Bandages
event.flavor: Simple battlefield bandages used by dungeon adventurers.
event.rules: Each bandage restores 3 Wounds. Use once then discard.

event.name: Bane Scroll of the Undead
event.flavor: This tattered old scroll bears the seal of a renowned Bretonnian
event.rules: Lord. Reading aloud the words on this scroll will kill any single Undead creature worth up to 400 gold on a dice roll of 4, 5 or 6. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Bauble of Anurandel
event.flavor: Anurandel was a Wood Elf Sorceress of Loren, renowned for her soft voice, peaceful demeanour and hatred of battle.
event.rules: This innocuous looking bauble is in fact an item of great power. This bauble flashes with energy and its bearer may add +1 to all dice rolls to Escape from Pinning. PERMANENT

event.name: Beasthelm
event.flavor: Smoke incessantly curls from the hollows of this helm.
event.rules: The Beasthelm protects the wearer from only the most powerful blows. Any Damage Dice that scores a natural 6 against the wearer of the helm causes only half the Damage G.e. 3 Wounds instead of 6). PERMANENT

event.name: Belt of Valour
event.flavor: This belt is adorned with the ferocious face of a lion, flanked by glowing runes of power.
event.rules: A Warrior who dons this belt must roll 1D6 at the beginning of each Turn to see what the belt confers: 1 -1 Strength and -1 Toughness. 2-3 +1 Strength 45 +1 Toughness 6 +1 Strength and +1 Toughness The belt cannot be removed for the rest of the Turn. PERMANENT

event.name: Belt of the Beastmaster
event.flavor: The head of a vicious wolf glows on the front of this belt.
event.rules: Each time a group of Monsters who all attack a single Warrior (RPG: Monsters who have the Gang Up ability) appear on the same Board Section as the wearer of this belt, roll 1D6. If the score is a 3, 4 or 5, the beasts attack the Warriors using the rule of One-On-One instead. If the score is a 6, the beasts attack each other in the first round of Combat instead, after which they attack the Warriors using the Rule of One-On-One. PERMANENT

event.name: Berserker Sword
event.flavor: This brutal weapon appears to be crudely fashioned from a dull iron-like metal, and has sinister-looking runes engraved upon its hilt.
event.rules: When used by the Barbarian, this sword adds +1 to the dice roll to see if he becomes Berserk. When used by other Warriors, this sword has no magical effect. PERMANENT

event.name: Berserkers Brew
event.flavor: The liquid in this bottle burns the Warrior's throat, and they experience an uncontrollable desire to kill their enemies.
event.rules: When drunk, this potion lasts for an entire Combat. Each Turn, before they fight, the Warrior must roll 1D6, adding +1 to the score for every slain Monster on their Adventure Record Sheet. If the total score is 6 or more, the Warrior goes Berserk until the Combat is over. While Berserk, they get +1 Attack. If they roll a 1, however, the Warrior is so wild that all they do this Turn is slash about, causing 1 Wound to every adjacent Warrior. PERMANENT

event.name: Biting Blade
event.flavor: This sword has been magically sharpened to a razor-fine edge and is capable of biting through steel as if it were paper.
event.rules: This sword ignores all non-magical Armour (and up to 2 points of Magical Armour) when rolling for Damage. PERMANENT

event.name: Bitter Wind Crossbow
event.rules: Any bolt placed into this crossbows turns freezing cold. This crossbow is Strength 4 and any quarrel fired from it is considered magical. When using this crossbow a Warrior gets +1 To Hit and ignores up to 2 points of non-magical Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Black Desert Amulet
event.flavor: This artefact was used by an Arabyan Knight in the 1000 year long 'War of Death'. The power of the amulet can be invoked against one Monster each Turn.
event.rules: That Monster suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. The power of the amulet will regenerate after one use when there are no Monsters on the Board. If used twice without having regenerated, however, the amulet disintegrates after the second use and must be discarded. LASTS UNTIL DISINTEGRATES

event.name: Blade of Couronne
event.flavor: This is the blade that the master swordsmiths of Bretonnia forged to defeat an undead Liche-king many centuries past.
event.rules: Each Undead Monster in a square adjacent to a Warrior wielding this sword automatically suffers 1 Wound at the end of each Turn, after any Regeneration, with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Blade of Leaping Copper
event.flavor: This sword seems to have a life of its own, striking in a blurred arc of slicing metal.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this sword gets +1 Attack. PERMANENT

event.name: Blade of Sea Gold
event.flavor: Forged from gold taken from the depths of the sea when the world was young, this blade is covered in runes so ancient and worn that they can no longer be read.
event.rules: This sword ignores 1 point Armour when determining Damage. PERMANENT

event.name: Blade of Slicing
event.flavor: This sword moans softly as it is drawn from its scabbard, in eager anticipation of the blood it is about to spill.
event.rules: This sword causes +2 Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Bladed Boots
event.flavor: These unusual boots have stiletto blades concealed in the toes.
event.rules: While a Warrior is wearing these boots, they gain a special Kick Attack which suffers -1 To Hit but is resolved at +1 Strength. PERMANENT

event.name: Blessed Gem
event.flavor: This huge ruby has been empowered with warding spells engraved into it by the wizards of the Empire.
event.rules: Once per Turn, the Blessed Gem can be used to dispel a Necromantic spell. When the spell is cast, roll 1D6. On a roll of 4, 5 or 6 the spell has no effect. PERMANENT

event.name: Blessed Sword
event.flavor: Cooled in the water of the Temple of Ulric, this sword is a powerful weapon of purity.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this sword, they only miss their opponent if their To Hit roll is a 1 or 2. PERMANENT

event.name: Blessed Water
event.flavor: The Blessed Water can be used to heal, exorcise evil spirits and banish Undead.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks some Blessed Water has 1D6 Wounds restored. If the result is a 1, however, it means that the Blessed Water has run out; discard it. The water can also be thrown as a missile weapon. Any Daemonic or Undead creatures hit suffer 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. If a Warrior throws the Blessed Water, it must be discarded. DISCARD ON A ROLL OF 1

event.name: Bloodblade Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior's sword glows as a thick red liquid coagulates on the blade.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for each Monster adjacent to the Warrior bearing the scroll. On a score of 5 or 6 that Monster suffers 1 Wound with no modifiers for anything. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Bloodletting Sword
event.flavor: This dark blade glows with an internal pulse.
event.rules: The sword drinks the blood of its victims, causing +1D6 Wounds every time it hits. However, if the wielder rolls a 1 To Hit, the blade takes the energy it needs from the Warrior instead causing 1D3 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Bloodpulse Scroll
event.flavor: A dull throbbing fills the room as it becomes suffused with a red glow.
event.rules: The Warrior bearing the scroll immediately has 1D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Blur Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior's outline shimmers and becomes an indistinct, hazy blur that is continually changing.
event.rules: Pick any Warrior on the Board. All Attacks made against the chosen Warrior suffer -1 To Hit for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Bograt's Krown
event.flavor: Faded runes are inscribed upon the pitted surface of this grubby looking circlet of rusted iron.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this crown gets +1 Toughness. Bograt's Krown can be worn at the same time as a helmet. PERMANENT

event.name: Bone Blade
event.flavor: This magical blade is made from a bleached white substance that looks like bone, but is as sharp as steel.
event.rules: A Warrior may use this sword once per Adventure. If their Attack hits, the sword causes + 1D6 Wounds. (RPG: For one Turn per Adventure, the Warrior may trade in all their normal Attacks and use this sword to make a single Attack that causes normal Damage + (1D6 per Battle-level) extra Wounds.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Bone of Turgit
event.flavor: Turgit was as seemingly unstoppable Chaos Lord finally defeated by a group of Empire Battle Wizards who simultaneously cast their spells on him. The result was so powerful that the magic became fused into his bones.
event.rules: A Warrior may use this bone by rolling 1D6. If the score is a 6, every Chaos creature adjacent to the Warrior suffers 1 Wound (RPG: per Battle-level) with no modifiers for anything. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Book of Magic Distortion
event.flavor: This book contains powerful incantations that manipulate the
event.rules: Winds of Magic. The Wizard may use this book just after the Power Phase has been rolled in an attempt to change the amount of Power that is available to him this Turn. Roll 1D6. The result is now the amount of Power that he has for the Turn. Note that this does not change the Power Phase. If the Power Phase roll was a 1, an Uneventful Event still occurs (RPG: and the Wizard may not add his Battle-level to the result). USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Book of Prowess
event.flavor: The pages of this book are initially blinding to the eyes. Eventually the light dims and the book can be read.
event.rules: A Warrior who reads this book may add +1 to their Weapon Skill Characteristic permanently. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Boots of Anurandel
event.flavor: Anurandel was a Wood Elf Sorceress, renowned for her peaceful demeanour, sunny disposition and hatred of battle.
event.rules: She fashioned many items to aid her followers should they be assailed by dark forces. These boots give the wearer the ability to dodge missile fire. Whenever a Warrior wearing these boots is attacked with a missile weapon, roll 1D6. On a score of 6 the attack misses. (RPG: The boots give the Warrior the Dodge 6+ ability against missile fire.) PERMANENT

event.name: Boots of Barging
event.flavor: The steel toes of these leather boots are emblazoned with a Magic rune in the shape of a key.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing these boots may attempt to kick open any closed door by rolling 1D6. If the result is a 5 or 6 66 if the door is magically locked), the door opens. Only one attempt may be made per door and any traps on the door are set off as normal. PERMANENT

event.name: Boots of Battle
event.flavor: These sturdy iron-shod boots are magically made to be an exact fit for whoever wears them.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing these boots gets +1 Weapon Skill and +1 Ballistic Skill. PERMANENT

event.name: Boots of Leaping
event.flavor: These boots are fashioned from the tough leather of a Wyvern's wings.
event.rules: These boots allow the Warrior to leap 1 square in any direction as part of their Movement, landing in the square beyond. Any obstacle in the square being leaped is ignored, though it still counts as 1 square of Movement. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Boots of Quargskin
event.flavor: These boots are made of a strange, soft leather.
event.rules: One per Adventure the Warrior wearing these boots gets +2 Movement for one Turn. (RPG: If the Warrior tries to sell these boots, no self-respecting trader will take them seriously and as such they cannot be sold.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Boots of Swiftness
event.flavor: These dusty boots are made of a strange material. When worn, the world seems to blur and slow down.
event.rules: While wearing the Boots of Swiftness a Warrior gets +1 Movement. PERMANENT

event.name: Boots of Tzchak
event.flavor: This long dead sorcerer Baalga the All-Seeing created these boots to enable his long suffering henchman Tzchak to walk long distances carrying immensely heavy loads.
event.rules: These boots allow the wearer to ignore any Armour-based Movement penalties. PERMANENT

event.name: Bow of Tiranoc
event.flavor: This mighty bow was crafted by the Elves of Tiranoc from a single Starwood branch.
event.rules: When the land of Tiranoc was engulfed by the sea, the bow was carried to the Old World, a fabled treasure of a fallen kingdom. This bow is Strength 2 and causes +3 Wounds. It may be fired twice per Turn. PERMANENT

event.name: Bow of Tor Alessi
event.flavor: This white bow was captured by the Dwarfs at the fall of the
event.rules: Elf city of Tor Alessi. Its accuracy is beyond compare, and it was considered a prize worthy of the bloodshed and slaughter that won it. This bow is Strength 4 and, rather than having to move then attack as usual, the wielder may fire it before, during or after their Movement instead. PERMANENT

event.name: Bracelet of Ashain
event.flavor: This slim golden band fits comfortably around the wearer's forearm, even on top of armour.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this bracelet gets +3 Starting Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Bracelet of Transformation
event.flavor: This plain bronze bracelet has a single rune embossed on its surface.
event.rules: A Warrior who dons this bracelet may take on the appearance (and only the appearance) of any creature. While transformed, the Warrior will not be attacked and may automatically Escape from Pinning as long as they do not initiate combat. As soon as the Warrior attacks a target in any way the bracelet's effects wear off. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Bronze Sigil Sword
event.flavor: The runes on this blade shimmer in the light. It is exceptionally light and well-balanced in the hand.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this sword gets +2 Initiative. PERMANENT

event.name: Bugman's XXXXXX
event.flavor: This sturdy wooden barrel bears the mark of the great Dwarf
event.rules: Master Brewer Josef Bugman. This is a barrel of the fabled Bugman's XXXXXX beer! There is enough beer for four drinks. If a Warrior takes a drink of the beer, they have 1D6 Wounds restored, but they suffer - 3 To Hit for the next 1D3 Turns. Every drink still left in the barrel is worth 50 gold. DISCARD WHEN ALL DRUNK

event.name: Bull Horn
event.flavor: This horn was removed from a ferocious Minotaur and then fashioned into an instrument. Imbued with a strange magic, the horn seems to invigorate those who hear it.
event.rules: When this horn is blown, each Warrior on the Board gets +1D3 Strength. The effect lasts until a 1 or 2 is rolled in the Power Phase. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Candle of Lost Souls
event.flavor: Smoke rises from the bottom of this candle like spirits searching for something they cannot seem to find.
event.rules: Once lit, this candle will illuminate the Board Section the bearer is on, just like the leader with the Lantern. It is not bright enough to be used to Explore through a Doorway. If the bearer of the candle flees the Dungeon, they do not need to roll on the Escaping the Dungeon Table. LASTS FOR ONE ADVENTURE

event.name: Captain's Cutlass
event.flavor: The point of this curved blade gleams with a viciousness that only a dirty, rotten sea scoundrel could appreciate.
event.rules: A cutlass is more effective when used with finesse rather than brute strength. A Warrior wielding this sword adds their Weapon Skill to the Damage rather than their Strength. In addition, this magical cutlass causes +1D6 Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Carnival of Death Scroll
event.flavor: Overcome by an unreasoning madness, the Monsters leap towards each other in a berserk killing frenzy, completely ignoring the Warriors.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 for every Monster on the same Board Section as the bearer of the scroll. On a score of 5 or 6 that Monster moves towards the nearest Monster and attacks it this Turn instead of the Warriors. If there is any confusion about which Monsters are attacked, the bearer of the scroll decides. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Casket of Sorcery
event.flavor: This golden casket emits a soft hum which continuously raises and lowers in pitch.
event.rules: If they do nothing else this Turn, the Warrior bearing this casket may attempt to use it to capture a single spell of their choice from an adjacent enemy spellcaster. Roll 1D6. If the score is a 4, 5 or 6, the casket absorbs the spell and prevents the spellcaster from casting it again. (RPG: If the destroyed spell is rolled on a Monster's Spell Table when determining which spell it casts, roll again.) The Warrior may automatically cast the captured spell once during Combat. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Cataclysm Scroll
event.flavor: Moaning in anguish, the Warrior spreads their arms as an area of blackness takes shape around their foes.
event.rules: Pick any 2 square by 2 square area on the same Board Section as the bearer of the scroll. Every Monster in the chosen area suffers 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for anything. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Chalice of Fate
event.flavor: The Chalice of Fate has the power to warp time, to change fate, and to alter reality.
event.rules: A Warrior may use the Chalice of Fate to re-roll the Power Phase roll. They may only re-roll once, and must accept the result of the second roll even if the score is worse. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Chalice of Vigour
event.flavor: This chalice is one of the legendary artefacts created by the
event.rules: Priest King Alcadizzar. Much sought after by Witch Hunters, the chalice is filled with a golden liquid, which never dims or dries up. During Combat the Warriors may inhale the pungent vapours that rise from the bubbling golden liquid. For the duration of the Combat, on a roll of 6 To Hit, the Warriors will cause +1D3 Wounds. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Chalk
event.flavor: Inside a small pouch is a modest amount of chalk, the kind that adventurers take into maze-like dungeons.
event.rules: This chalk allows a Warrior to mark an escape route out of the Dungeon. The Warrior does not need to roll on the Escaping the Dungeon Table should they wish to leave the Dungeon. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Chaos Bane
event.flavor: This innocuous gourd is filled with a foul-smelling paste.
event.rules: A weapon that has been smeared with this paste causes +1 Wound (RPG: +1 Wound per Battle-level) against Chaos creatures it hits. There is enough of the bane to coat one weapon for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Charm of Learning
event.flavor: Donning this charm brings everything into sudden clarity.
event.rules: This beautiful charm is worth 100 gold. (RPG: This charm allows a Warrior to assimilate the knowledge required for training very quickly indeed. It costs them 300 less gold (per Battle-level) than usual to train to the next Battle- level.) USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Charm of Prosperity
event.rules: The bearer of this charm becomes very lucky indeed! Anytime the bearer of this charm finds gold whilst adventuring in the Dungeon, they discover an extra 1D6x10 gold hidden in the area. (RPG: In addition, whenever the bearer of this charm participates in gambling or other games of chance, they may add +1 to their score.) PERMANENT

event.name: Chest of Gold
event.flavor: A chest filled with sparkling gold coins is a welcome sight to any
event.rules: Warrior. The chest contains 1D6x100 gold. RECORD THEN DISCARD

event.name: Circlet of Repanse
event.flavor: Repanse de Lyonesse was a Bretonnian Paladin famous for her assault on an invading Chaos army.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this crown gets +1 Strength The Circlet of Repanse cannot be worn with a helmet. PERMANENT

event.name: Circlet of Wrath
event.flavor: This band of silvered, luminescent metal, worn around the forehead, glistens and gleams with an unnatural light. This circlet allows the wearer to enter a destructive blood rage.
event.rules: Upon entering this state the Warrior doubles their regular Attack Characteristic for one Turn and must roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the enraged Warrior must move towards the nearest Warrior and attack them instead. While in this state the Warrior may automatically Escape from Pinning. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Cloak of Anadon
event.flavor: This cloak is made from a fabric that seems impossible to tear.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears this cloak gets +1 Toughness. However, if any Damage Dice from an opponent scores a natural 6, the cloak ceases to provide any more benefit (RPG: until the beginning of the next Adventure). PERMANENT

event.name: Cloak of Deception
event.flavor: This cloak swirls around the Warrior as they move, deceiving the eye as to their precise location, and causing their opponents to become ensnared in its all enveloping folds.
event.rules: All Attacks against the Warrior wearing this cloak suffer -1 To Hit. If an attacker scores a 6 To Hit, however, the power of the cloak is exhausted (RPG: until the next Adventure). PERMANENT

event.name: Cloak of Invisibility
event.flavor: This cloak catches the light in a very strange manner, becoming transparent in places as if it were full of holes.
event.rules: While wearing this cloak the Warrior becomes invisible and therefore cannot be attacked. They may fight as normal. The cloak contains enough power to keep the Warrior invisible for one Turn per Adventure. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Cloak of Loren
event.flavor: This cloak is made of a fine, silk-like material that, although extremely light, is very, very strong.
event.rules: Every time a Warrior is hit while wearing this cloak, they can ignore the first Wound caused by the blow. However, each time the cloak absorbs Damage like this, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the cloak rips and is useless. PERMANENT

event.name: Cloak of Stealth
event.flavor: This cloak is made of an odd material that is slippery to the touch.
event.rules: While a Warrior is wearing this cloak they may automatically Escape from Pinning once per Adventure. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Cloak of the Woods
event.flavor: This magical cloak is woven with leaves, animal hide and bird feathers.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears the cloak to jump up into the air for one Turn before slowly settling back to the ground. While in the air, the Warrior may not engage in hand-to-hand Combat but any missile Attacks they make get +1 To hit, while any missile attacks against them suffer -1 To Hit. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Confuse Scroll
event.flavor: The scroll bears the words for the Confuse spell. The arcane words create confusing images around the Monster's head, and it stumbles around befuddled.
event.rules: Pick any Monster on the same Board Section as the Warrior bearing the scroll. That Monster suffers -1 Attack this Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Coughing Spell Jewel
event.flavor: This jewel contains the power of the Coughing spell. When used, the Warrior's opponent suddenly bursts out in a hacking cough of such violence that they look as if they may drop their weapon.
event.rules: Pick any Monster on the same Board Section as the Warrior with the jewel and roll 1D6. On a score of 6 the target succumbs to a coughing spasm and suffers -1 To Hit for the rest of the Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Create Bridge Scroll
event.flavor: Solid rock leaps from the Warrior's outstretched fingertips, building a bridge across the room.
event.rules: When cast, this spell allows the bearer to create a magical bridge 1 square wide across any pit, hole or chasm. The bridge remains in place until a 1 is rolled in the Power Phase, at which point it suddenly disappears. Any models on the bridge at that time plummet into whatever the bridge was crossing. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Crown of Madness
event.flavor: This crown pitches the wearer into a world of insane lunacy.
event.rules: This valuable gold crown is worth 250 gold. (RPG: Cackling and giggling to themselves at their own macabre jokes, the Warrior wearing the crown finds the death and carnage in the Dungeon most amusing. They now get +1 to all psychology based tests such as Fear and Terror.) PERMANENT

event.name: Crown of Night
event.flavor: This jet black crown is fashioned from bands of iron and engraved with powerful runes that crackle and spit with an incandescent blue light.
event.rules: Each time a spell is cast against the Warrior wearing this crown, roll 1D6. On a score of 6 the spell has no effect on them (RPG: the crown gives the wearer the Magic Resistance 6+ ability.) PERMANENT

event.name: Crown of Rebellion
event.flavor: This crown was worn by Rhag Hellroar who became a great
event.rules: Norse Chieftain. The wearer of this enchanted crown gets +1 Attack and +1 To Hit. If any of their To Hit rolls score a natural 1, however, the wearer may not make any offensive actions during the next Turn, and gets +2 Toughness instead. PERMANENT

event.name: Crown of Winter
event.flavor: This magical crown was created long ago by an Ice Witch of Kislev and is said to contain some of her magical power.
event.rules: When the wearer invokes the power of the crown, for one Turn all Attacks made by the wearer cause +3 Wounds and the weapon they are using is treated as magical. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Cure Small Wounds Scroll
event.flavor: This scroll bears the words for the Cure Light Wounds spell.
event.rules: When the Warrior uses the scroll, pick any Warrior on the Board and roll 1D6. On a score of 6 the spell restores 1 of their Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Daemon Statuette
event.flavor: The life-like features on this small figurine are _ quite disconcerting.
event.rules: A Warrior may toss this magical figurine into the air during Combat, where it will grow in size and hover above the Monsters. In the next Monster's Phase every Monster on the Board will attack the figurine instead of the Warriors. The figure can absorb a total of 20 Wounds before it is destroyed and the Monsters' attention turns back to the Warriors. If it survives the Combat, it may be used, but note how many Wounds it has left to absorb. LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Dagger of Treachery
event.flavor: This dagger imbeds itself in the target, refusing to be removed.
event.rules: A Warrior may attempt to plunge this dagger into any adjacent Monster at any time by rolling 1D6: 1 The Warrior accidentally stabs an adjacent Warrior (determined at random) who suffers 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. 2-5 The Monster suffers 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. 6 The Monster suffers 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. At the start of each Turn thereafter the Monster suffers 1D3 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. The dagger may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. USE ONCE PER COMBAT

event.name: Dart of Suffering
event.flavor: Tucked within a velvet sheath, this small dart is more than it seems... In addition to any other attacks they may have, a Warrior may throw this dart as a missile weapon with a Range of 6 squares. The Warrior suffers -1 To Hit if the target is 4 squares away, -2 if the target is 5 squares away, and -3 If the target is 6 squares away.
event.rules: If it hits, the dart causes 1D6 Damage with no modifiers for anything. The dart painfully embeds itself into the Monster and the creature suffers -1 To Hit for the rest of the Combat. The dart may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. USE ONCE PER COMBAT

event.name: Darting Steel Daggers
event.flavor: These two daggers of purest steel were forged in the time of the High Elves. Ancient sigils bind powerful spells of destruction to their blades.
event.rules: While using the Darting Steel Daggers a Warrior gets +1 Attack and each Attack made with the daggers automatically hits. However, each hit will only cause 1D6 Wounds, with no modifiers for Strength. PERMANENT

event.name: Dazzle Scroll
event.flavor: A blurring screen of energy shoots towards the target, engulfing it in a maze of glittering colours.
event.rules: When used, the bearer of the scroll may pick any Monster on the board. For this Turn, all hand-to-hand Attacks made against the Monster only miss on a natural To Hit roll of 1. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Deathstone
event.flavor: The Deathstone is a small black crystal that seems to soak up the light from the lantern, converting it into raw power.
event.rules: The Deathstone acts as a source of Power for the Wizard. When casting a spell, he may use the Deathstone to increase his chance of success. Roll 1D6. On a 3, 4, 5 or 6, the spell may be cast at a cost of zero Power instead of its normal cost. On a 1 or 2, the spell fails and all the Wizard's Power for the Turn is lost. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Deathsword
event.flavor: This sword's power is such that it cannot really be controlled and would soon overwhelm whoever carried it.
event.rules: A Warrior using this sword may increase their Strength to 10 for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Destroy Magic Scroll
event.flavor: This piece of crisp white parchment rustles and crackles, silver lettering shifting across the page.
event.rules: This scroll allows the bearer to automatically dispel any one spell cast against them or their companions. That spell has no effect. (RPG: The spell is also destroyed, preventing the caster from ever casting it again. If a destroyed spell is rolled on a Monster's Spell Table when determining which spell it casts, roll again.) USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Dispel Magic Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior bearing the scroll raises their hand and shouts the words of warding, diffusing their opponent's magic.
event.rules: The Dispel Magic scroll may be used to attempt to dispel another spell that has just been cast. Roll 1D6. If the score is 4, 5 or 6 that spell has no effect. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Dome of Power Scroll
event.flavor: White power streams from the eyes of the Warrior bearing the scroll, forming a protective dome around the Warriors.
event.rules: This scroll allows the bearer to protect up to 4 squares of the Board with an impenetrable magic shield for one Turn. The squares must be linked together, but the dome can be of any shape. Models inside the dome may not move, take offensive action or cast any other magic, but are immune to all forms of attack. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Doomsday Flail
event.flavor: A heavy stone, carved in the shape of a ferocious beast, rests at the end of this flail.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this flail, they get +2 Strength. If the wielder's To Hit roll is a natural 6, the flail causes Double Damage. If the wielder has a Weapon Skill less than 5 (including items, special abilities, etc.) and rolls a 1 To Hit, they hit themselves causing normal Damage. PERMANENT

event.name: Door Spikes
event.flavor: These durable iron spikes are the kind used to wedge doors shut. A spike keeps a door closed for one Turn. To use a spike, a Warrior must be adjacent to a door. Once spiked, a door cannot be opened unless it is broken down. For someone to break down a door, they must be adjacent to it.
event.rules: Roll 1D6 and add their Strength. If the total is 9 or more, the door is broken down. There are 1D6 spikes. Each spike can be used once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Dragon Shield
event.flavor: This shield is fashioned from the deep-red, sulphurous scales of a Great Fire Dragon.
event.rules: A Warrior bearing this shield gets +1 Toughness. Once per Adventure they may use the shield to ignore all of the effects from any one attack, whatever its origin. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Dragonflame Rod
event.flavor: A fire suddenly erupts from the end of this rod, scorching all who come in contact with it. The rod may be used at any time against one Monster adjacent to the bearer. It causes 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. (RPG: If used against a Mummy, the creature is also set alight.
event.rules: AT the start of each Monsters' Phase thereafter the Mummy suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. If the roll is a 1 when determining Damage, the fire goes out and the Mummy suffers no more fire Damage. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Dragonhelm
event.flavor: This ancient Elven helm is inscribed with a glowing rune of fire.
event.rules: While a Warrior is wearing this helmet they get +1 Toughness (RPG: or +2 Toughness against any fire-based attacks). PERMANENT

event.name: Drop Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior mutters the words on the scroll and gestures towards the ground, causing the target's grip on its weapon to fail.
event.rules: Pick any Monster on the same Board Section as the bearer of the scroll. The target drops any one object they are holding. The Monster may do nothing for one Turn as they retrieve it. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Dungeon Map
event.flavor: This tightly sealed wooden tube protects a valuable parchment. The tube contains an ancient map of a Dungeon. From looking at the map, the Warriors can see that there is a secret door leading out of one of the rooms.
event.rules: On the next new Board Section that the Warriors enter, place an extra Doorway on one of the free walls. Through the Doorway is a single Dungeon Room. When the Warriors enter the room, take 2 Event Cards. Once the Events are completed, the Warriors gain two items of Dungeon Room Treasure in addition to any they gain for completing the Eents. USE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Dwarf Pick
event.flavor: This old but serviceable pick looks like the ones used by Dwarf miners.
event.rules: A Warrior may use the pick to dig their way through a cave-in. It takes 1D6 Turns to clear a way through the rubble. After each successful use, roll 1D6. On a roll of 1 the pick breaks and must be discarded. LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Dwarf Warhammer
event.flavor: This Dwarf warhammer glows with a pale blue light.
event.rules: This magical Warhammer causes +1 Wound. PERMANENT

event.name: Elf Waybread
event.flavor: This nutritious, delicious, cake-like food is what Elves take with them on long journeys. There are 1D6 pieces of Elf Waybread. Each cake restores 1 Wound to the Warrior who eats it.
event.rules: At the end of each Adventure, roll 1D6 for each piece of Waybread. If the score is a 1, that piece has spoiled and must be discarded. DISCARD WHEN ALL EATEN

event.name: Eltharion's Bow
event.flavor: This bow is enchanted with Elf magic that makes it much more accurate.
event.rules: This bow is Strength 4. While a Warrior is using this bow, they get +1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Emperor's Noose
event.flavor: This enchanted rope was commissioned by a long-dead Emperor from far-off Nippon to assassinate his foes. It was also the instrument of his death...
event.rules: The bearer may direct this rope to strangle any Monster on the Board. Roll 1D6. If the score is 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6, the Monster suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. If the score is a 1, the rope attacks the Warrior instead! At the beginning of each Turn thereafter, roll 1D6. If the total is equal to or greater than the victim's Strength, they suffer another 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. If the total is less than the target's Strength, they manage to free themselves. USE ONCE PER COMBAT

event.name: Enchanted Garlic
event.flavor: The Fay Enchantress of Bretonnia placed a spell upon this bulb of garlic to help a Bretonnian Knight in his battle against a monstrous Vampire.
event.rules: Any Vampire attacking a Warrior bearing this garlic suffers -1 To Hit. (RPG: At the end of each Adventure, roll 1D6. If the score is a 1, then the enchantment has worn off and the garlic must be discarded.) PERMANENT

event.name: Enchanted Shield
event.flavor: This magic shield expands and swells whenever the bearer is being assaulted.
event.rules: A Warrior bearing this shield gets +1 Toughness. Each time the bearer is hit they may use it to try and absorb the blow. Roll 1D6. On a5 or 6, the shield absorbs all the Damage. On a roll of 1, the shield explodes and the Warrior takes 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. LASTS UNTIL EXPLODES

event.name: Energy Jewel
event.flavor: This glowing jewel, set in a silver clasp, stores powerful magic.
event.rules: This jewel contains 6 points of Power that the Wizard can use in the same way as his Power Tokens. Place a D6 on top of this card to show the jewel's current Power. Once all the points are used up it is useless and worthless. It cannot be recharged. The jewel is worth 50 ogld per unused point of Power. DISCARD WHEN DRAINED

event.name: Ensorcelled Blade
event.flavor: This blade of pure iron was tempered to the sound of arcane incantations in ages past. This weapon's magic guides the wielder's hand, making it easier to strike foes.
event.rules: While using the Ensorcelled Blade, a Warrior gets +1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Exotic Foods of Tilea
event.flavor: These exquisite sweetmeats from Tilea are preserved in tightly sealed stone containers.
event.rules: These foodstuffs are a rare delicacy, and are worth 50 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Extra Spikey Shoulder Pad
event.flavor: This shoulder pad once belonged to the late, great Blood Bowl
event.rules: Star Player Bozark 'The Boz' Bile-Belly. This piece of Blood Bowl memorabilia is worth 300 gold. If worn by an Ex-Blood Bowl Player, it causes +2 Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Fanged Death Helm
event.flavor: This helm is fashioned into the likeness of the gaping maw of a ravenous beast.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this helm gets +1 Toughness. In addition, they may nominate one of their Attacks each Turn. If that Attack hits, then the Warrior gains an extra bite attack from the helm which hits the same target automatically, doing 1D6 Damage with no modifiers for anything. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Feathers of Ind
event.flavor: In the Kingdoms of Ind, strange land of fabulous temples, dwell some of the most exotic beasts in the world.
event.rules: These are the feathers of mystical birds from Ind, the Land of a Thousand Gods. There are 1D3 sets of feathers and each set is worth 1D6x10 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Festival Treats
event.flavor: This drawstring bag is filled with colourful treats.
event.rules: Festival Treats can be eaten at any time but they are very hard and durable so each time a Warrior (except a Dwarf) tries to eat one, they must roll 1D6. If the score is 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6, the Warrior has 1 Wound restored. If the score is a 1, the Warrior painfully breaks a tooth on the treats and suffers 1 Wound instead. There are 2D6 treats and each is worth 10 gold. DISCARD WHEN ALL EATEN

event.name: Fine Clothes
event.flavor: These well preserved clothes would not look out of place in the wardrobe of a royal household.
event.rules: Having been carefully stored, these fine clothes are made of silk and inlaid with gold and jewels. There are 1D6 items, and each is worth 1D6x25 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Fine Elf Wine
event.flavor: Connoisseurs throughout the Old World speak with reverence of the exquisite wines made by Elves. There are 1D6 bottles of wine, and each is worth 100 gold.
event.rules: If a Warrior drinks a bottle of wine, they have 1D3 Wounds restored but suffer -1 To Hit for the next 1D3 Turns. DISCARD AFTER USE

event.name: Finger of Doom Scroll
event.flavor: This dusty scroll contains magical sigils that are traced in a spidery scrawl. It is the Finger of Doom spell - ancient and powerful magic.
event.rules: While he has this scroll, the Wizard may take the Finger of Doom Spell Card and use it just like any of his other spells. PERMANENT

event.name: Finger of Life Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior points at one of their companions and a thin stream of blue energy pours from their fingertips, revitalising them.
event.rules: Pick any Warrior on the Board and roll 1D6. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 the chosen Warrior has that many Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Fire Arrows
event.flavor: These regular arrows have been doused in oil and can be easily lit before firing.
event.rules: If these arrows hit, roll 1D6. If the score is a 4, 5 or 6, the target is set alight and suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. The Damage continues each Turn until the Damage roll comes up a natural 1 or 2 and the fire goes out, causing no more Wounds in subsequent Turns. There are 1D6+3 Fire Arrows. Each arrow can only be used once. DISCARD AFTER ALL USED

event.name: Fire Brew
event.flavor: This vial contains a pale red liquid that sparkles as it catches the light. It is the harsh and fiery liquid used by Orcs to heal their wounds. This is supposed to be a healing potion and holds enough liquid for four doses. Each unused dose is worth 100 gold. Whenever a Warrior takes a drink of the potion roll 1D6: 1 The potion tastes awful, and does no good at all other than induce a fit of vomiting!
event.rules: 2-4 The potion tastes pretty bad, searing the gullet, but quickly restores 1D6 Wounds. 5-6 The burning brew restores 1D6+1 Wounds (RPG: +1 Wound per Battle-level). DISCARD WHEN ALL DRUNK

event.name: Firebomb
event.flavor: From the rune inscribed on it, the fuse jutting out of the top, and its pungent smell, this large, spiked ball can only be a firebomb.
event.rules: The Firebomb may be thrown at any time and affects an area 2 squares by 2 squares. Any model in the area suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Firebombs
event.flavor: Prising the skull-marked lid off a wooden box, the Warriors uncover a stash of firebombs!
event.rules: A Firebomb may be thrown at any time, and affects an area 2 squares by 2 squares. Any model in the area suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. There are 1D6 Firebombs and each Firebomb can only be used once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Fist of Iron Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior conjures up a huge iron-mailed fist and sends it hurtling towards their opponent.
event.rules: Pick any Monster up to 6 squares away from the bearer of the scroll and roll 1D6. If the score is equal to or greater than the range of the target, it suffers 1D6+1 (RPG: 1D6+Battle-level Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Flail of Skulls
event.rules: At the end of each chain on this flail is a gnashing, biting, chattering skull! A Warrior using this flail gets +1 To Hit. Once per Adventure one of the Warrior's Attacks causes Triple Damage. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Flail of the Chimera
event.flavor: This flail was used by a Bretonnian Knight in his battle against an army of Chaos.
event.rules: A Warrior using this Flail gets +1 Strength. In addition, the Warrior may nominate one of their regular Attacks each Turn. If that Attack hits with a natural 6, treat it as 1D3 separate hits. Roll the Damage for each hit separately. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Flash Powder
event.flavor: This small, sturdy bag contains some notoriously volatile flash powder.
event.rules: The Flash Powder may be set off at any time to confuse the Warriors' enemies. After it has exploded, any Warriors who have not yet fought this Turn get +1 Attack. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Flask of Inferno
event.flavor: A volatile, magical fire rages inside of this thick flask. This flask may be thrown into any square, where it explodes into a ball of fire. Roll 1D3. The score indicates how many D6 Damage are inflicted on the model in the square, with no modifiers for Armour. The score is also the number of squares in every direction that the ball of fire expands to. The fire dissipates outward, with each square away from the centre taking a D6 less Damage than the previous, with no modifiers for Armour.
event.rules: See diagrams below: Aad IP 186/100) D205 208 108 Sieur Deas.. mle oe ae 'Pe! pa aegis 2D6 36 ees xs fe (D6, 1D6\<)) BS. 2D6 2D6/1DG} a pete "a wes a pet 3 1D6 Damage 2D6 Damage 3D6 Damage 1 square 2 squares 3 squares USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Flask of Poison
event.flavor: The label on this red-tinted bottle is unreadable and the liquid within swirls mysteriously.
event.rules: Any arrows or bladed weapons coated in this poison cause +2 Wounds on the next successful hit. There is enough poison for 1D6 applications, each of which last 1 Turn. Each unused application is worth 50 gold. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Fleet of Foot Scroll
event.flavor: This scroll bears the words for the Fleet of Foot spell. When cast, the bearer of this scroll feels light and swift
event.rules: Upon using this scroll the Warrior gets +1 Movement for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Flesh Worm Scroll
event.flavor: The scroll bears the words for a Flesh Worm spell. When cast, a small glowing worm appears, hurls itself at a Monster and burrows into its flesh.
event.rules: Pick a Monster on the same Board Section as the Warrior with the scroll. The Monster is attacked by a Flesh Worm and suffers 1 Wound with no modifiers for anything. At the start of every Turn thereafter, roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2, 3 or 4 the Flesh Worm dies. On a score of 5 or 6 it continues to feed and the victim suffers another 1 Wound. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Flute of Fate
event.flavor: This enchanted white flute was carved from a branch of the rare white oaks of Loren.
event.rules: When blown, the flute allows all of the Warriors on the same Board Section to re-roll one of their dice rolls this Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Flying Trousers
event.flavor: These yellow-stripped trousers are decorated with magical glowing runes.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears these trousers can fly for one Turn. While airborne, they can fly over all obstacles and automatically Escape from Pinning. Anyone who attacks them suffer -1 To Hit. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Freeze Scroll
event.flavor: A freezing wind swirls through the room, chilling the Monsters to the bone yet leaving the Warriors unharmed.
event.rules: Roll 1D6. The number shows two things: 1 The number of Monsters who may be affected by this spell. 2 The amount of Wounds each Monster affected suffers, with no modifiers for anything. The targets of this spell must be on the same Board Section as the bearer of the scroll. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Freezing Death Spell Jewel
event.flavor: This jewel is carved of ice that never melts and is freezing to the touch.
event.rules: When its power is invoked, it releases a lethal blast of icy shards at the Warrior's foes. This jewel may be used to cast the Freezing Death spell. The bearer makes an attack roll as if using a missile weapon. On a successful hit roll 1D6 to work out the jewel's Damage. If the score is a 1, the jewel causes 1D6 Wounds. If the score is a 2, the jewel causes 2D6 Wounds, on so on. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Fungus Brew
event.flavor: The slimy green potion in this flask turns Night Goblins into gibbering Fanatics.
event.rules: There is enough liquid in the flask for four doses. A Warrior can take a drink at any time during Combat. Roll 1D6 to see what happens: 1-2 The brew makes the Warrior hallucinate! They immediately make an attack against every model adjacent to them. 3-4 The brew restores 1D6 Wounds. 5-6 The brew restores 1D6 Wounds and the Warrior may ignore the Damage from the next blow they take. The brew is worth 200 gold if none of it has been drunk, or 100 gold if some of it (but not all of it!) has been consumed. DISCARD WHEN ALL DRUNK

event.name: Fur Cloak
event.flavor: Rolled up and placed over one arm, this thick fur cloak offers some protection in place of shield.
event.rules: If a Warrior uses this cloak instead of a Shield, they get +1 Toughness. Each time the Warrior wearing the cloak is hit, roll 1D6. If the roll is a 4, 5 or 6 it remains effective and can be used again. If the roll is a 1, 2 or 3 it is ruined and must be discarded. LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Gavel of Judgment
event.flavor: Carried long ago by the Witch Hunter Hernando Hellman, this magic item was used to subdue evil-doers so that they could be brought back to stand trial for their crimes.
event.rules: This gavel may be thrown as a missile weapon but the Warrior throwing suffers -1 To Hit. Anything struck by the gavel is rendered unconscious for the next 1D3 Turns. If the To Hit roll is a natural 1, however, the gavel mysteriously vanishes (discard it). Further attacks against an unconscious target only miss ona To Hit roll of 1. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Gem of Passage
event.flavor: The Gem of Passage was wrought many centuries ago by the Dwarfs. It aided them in building their underground empire and can be used to control the very rocks that make up the ceiling and floor of the dungeon.
event.rules: When a Warrior invokes its power, the Gem of Passage opens up a hole in one of the walls. Place another Doorway on the Board Section the Warrior occupies. Beyond this Doorway will be 1D6+3 more Dungeon Cards which the Warriors can explore as normal. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Gem of Selection
event.flavor: This gem was crafted by a clever Halfling who always seemed to avoid being selected for perilous errands outside the Moot.
event.rules: If the rules require a Warrior to be randomly determined for any reason, the bearer of this gem may decide which Warrior is selected instead. The first time the gem is used, turn this card upside-down; when it Is used a second time, flip this card over. USE TWICE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Ghost Powder
event.flavor: Every component in this powder was blessed by a priest of Sigmar and then enchanted by a wizard.
event.rules: A Warrior may use this powder to coat one of their weapons. In the first Turn when it is applied, the weapon causes +2D6 Wounds against any Undead. During the second Turn, it causes +1D6 Wounds. In the third Turn it causes +1D3 Wounds, after which the effects wear off. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Giant Slayer
event.flavor: This massive sword may only be wielded with both hands and even then it takes a mighty Warrior to use it effectively.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this two-handed sword they get +3 Strength. PERMANENT

event.name: Glittering Robe Scroll
event.flavor: The scroll bears the words for the Glittering Robe spell. The
event.rules: Warrior bearing the scroll creates a robe of magical energy that shimmers and glitters about them as they move. This spell creates a cloak of magical energy around the bearer, which absorbs the next 1D6 Wounds they would suffer, after which it fades away. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Globe of Detection
event.flavor: The Globe of Detection allows the Warrior's vision to pierce the solid rock of the dungeon walls.
event.rules: A Warrior with this globe can easily find hidden passages. When the Warrior rolls on the Hidden Passages Table, they mad add +1 to their roll. However, if the Warrior rolls a 1, then that result stands and the Warrior will suffer the 'Collapse!' result. USE ONCE PER TURN GLORY! SCROLL (DEW) The Warrior bearing the scroll sends out tendrils of force that pierce the hearts of the Warriors, filling them with great valour and courage beyond measure. All of the Warriors are suddenly enthused with great bravery and each gets +1 Attack this Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Glory! Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior bearing the scroll sends out tendrils of force that pierce the hearts of the Warriors, filling them with great valour and courage beyond measure.
event.rules: All of the Warriors are suddenly enthused with great bravery and each gets +1 Attack this Turn. Use once then discard.

event.name: Glowstone
event.flavor: This small crystal orb holds the light of the dawn, giving off the same light as the Lantern.
event.rules: Once activated, the orb glows brightly and the bearer can explore in the same manner as the leader with the Lantern. How long the Glowstone will last is unknown, however, and if the Power Phase roll is a 1, roll a further 1D6. On a score of 1, 2 or 3 the glow dies and the Glowstone is useless and worthless. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Goblet of Vitality
event.flavor: This goblet is suffused in a brilliant golden aura which expands to fill the area, flooding it with bright light.
event.rules: When the power of this cup is used, each Warrior on the Board Section has 3 Wounds restored. << USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Grey Armour of Eshkalon
event.flavor: This dull grey armour is made of a flaky, stone-like substance and is extremely resilient.
event.rules: Whenever a Warrior wearing this armour is hit by an Attack, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the armour shatters and is useless and worthless. On a 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6 the armour absorbs that many Wounds. LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Grim Mace
event.flavor: This mace seeks the death of those around it.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this mace they get +1 Strength. Once per Adventure, if a Warrior forgoes all of the regular Attacks this Turn, every adjacent model (friend or foe) suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Grimstone
event.flavor: The age-pitted surface of this ancient stone hides the power to drain the life energy of others and transfer it to its wearer.
event.rules: Upon invoking the Grimstone choose any other Warrior in the party. The bearer now has the same number of Wounds as the Warrior, while they now have the number of Wounds the bearer had. In effect, their Wounds are swapped. The Grimstone may never be used to take a Warrior above their Starting Wounds, which remain as they were. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Grudgehammer
event.flavor: This magical hammer was constructed to help settle grievous offences against Dwarfs.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this weapon, they may re-roll the first Attack that misses each Turn. PERMANENT

event.name: Grulmak's Axe
event.flavor: This black-bladed axe exudes a poisonous, corrosive slime. It is rumoured to be the axe stolen from Chaos Warlord Grulmak Deathmonger by the - notorious' Hobgoblin Scragface Throatslasher.
event.rules: This axe ignores 3 points of Armour, and spatters acid everywhere. At the end of the Warriors' Phase, every model adjacent to the wielder suffers 1 Wound with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. However, every time the wielder rolls a 1 To Hit, they are struck by the acid themselves and suffer 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. PERMANENT

event.name: Halo of Vengeance Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior bearing the scroll casts a glowing halo around themselves.
event.rules: This spell surrounds the Warrior with a protective shield. At the start of each Turn roll 1D6. The result is the number of Attacks that can be absorbed by the halo this Turn. Ignore all of the Damage from those attacks. The halo remains until the bearer moves or a 1 is rolled on the dice to see how many Attacks are absorbed. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Hammer of Deliverance
event.flavor: This magical hammer was forged by a devoted follower of Morr, the God of the Dead.
event.rules: A Warrior using this hammer causes Double Damage if their To Hit roll is a natural 6. In addition, both the wielder, and any Monster hit by the hammer (even if it causes no Damage), can only restore half the number of Wounds from any healing that they receive this Turn. (RPG: nor can they use the Regenerate ability if they have it this Turn.) PERMANENT

event.name: Hammer of Hargon
event.flavor: This sturdy Dwarf warhammer has an ornate icon carved on its head. Any Dwarf in the party recognises this as the lost Hammer of Hargon.
event.rules: When using this hammer a Warrior may roll as many dice for Damage as they like. Add up the total, then add the Warrior's Strength to the final score. However, if any of the dice come up with a 1 or 2, the hammer causes no Damage at all. PERMANENT

event.name: Hammer of Scorching
event.flavor: The face of this hammer is so hot, that it heats up any surface it touches. This hammer causes +1D6 Wounds.
event.rules: If the target is wearing non-magical Armour, however, the hammer causes +2D6 Wounds instead. PERMANENT

event.name: Harbinger Staff
event.flavor: This staff calls out warnings during combat, alerting the wielder to incoming attacks.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this staff gets +3 Toughness. (RPG: The staff is cumbersome in combat, however, and the Warrior suffers -1 Attack to a minimum of 1. PERMANENT

event.name: Healing Hands Jewel
event.flavor: This jewel contains the power for the Healing Hands spell. When used, the Warriors feel a soothing calmness descend upon them.
event.rules: When the power of this jewel is used, every Warrior on the Board has 1 Wound restored. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Healing Potion
event.flavor: Inside this tightly sealed glass jar is a small quantity of a liquid that can only be a healing potion.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion has 1D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Healing Salve
event.flavor: Although ominous in appearance, the thick, yellow paste contained within this black bottle is a salve of healing.
event.rules: The healing salve can restore 2D6 Wounds to any single Warrior, or 1D6 Wounds to each of 2 different Warriors. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Heartbeat Scroll
event.flavor: As the Warrior utters the words on this scroll, power surges through the target's body and their heart beats with renewed Vigour.
event.rules: Pick any Warrior on the Board. That Warrior has 2D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Heartseeker
event.flavor: This sword has the ability to warp time, guiding its own destiny to the benefit of whoever wields it in battle.
event.rules: Once per Turn, while a Warrior is using this sword, they may re- roll any one of their Attacks that misses. PERMANENT

event.name: Hell Mace
event.flavor: Sparks fly from the iron-shod head of this mace as it is wielded, bathing the area in light.
event.rules: While using the Hell Mace a Warrior gets +2 Attacks. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Hellbeast Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior assumes the aspect of a daemonic creature.
event.rules: When used, the Warrior bearing this scroll gets 1 Attack, +1 To Hit, causes +2 Wounds and cannot use a weapon. (APG: In addition, they are immune to all psychological effects such as Fear or Terror, for one Turn). USE ONCE THEN DSICARD

event.name: Helm of Absorption
event.flavor: This helm protects the wearer against the arcane arts.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears this helm gets +1 Toughness. In addition, they may attempt to absorb any spell cast on them by rolling 1D6. If the score is a 2+, the helm absorbs the spell and the Warrior suffers no effects. If successful, the next time the Warrior uses the helm to absorb a spell they need a 3+ and so on. This continues up to 6+, after which the cycle starts all over again. If the score is ever a 1, the helm explodes and the Warrior suffers 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Hidden Alcove
event.flavor: After a thorough search, one of the Warriors finds a secret panel which opens, revealing a hidden alcove. To see what the alcove contains, the Warrior may roll as many dice as they like. If any score a 1 they have found nothing, and managed to make a lot of noise - take an Event card immediately. If any come up with a 2, 3, 4, or 5, the Warrior gains gold equal to the total of those dice multiplied by 10. For each dice that scores a 6, they receive an item of Dungeon Room Treasure.
event.rules: USE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Holy Artefact
event.flavor: This ornate artefact obviously belongs to one of the temples of the Empire.
event.rules: At the end of the Adventure roll 1D6 to see whether you find a temple. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 you find a temple and sell the artefact for 1D6x100 gold. (RPG: You may find a temple in any Settlement. If you roll a 1 when seeing how much gold you receive, then you actually get nothing - it is not an artefact they recognise. You will have to try again in the next Settlement you come to.) DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Holy Water
event.flavor: A glass phial of glowing water like this is an ideal tool in the arsenal of many Witch Hunters.
event.rules: This phial can be thrown as a missile weapon. It causes 1D6 Wounds to any Daemonic, Undead or Chaotic creatures hit. It also causes 1D3 Wounds to any such creatures adjacent to the target, with no modifiers for anything. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Horn of Animosity
event.flavor: Blowing this horn produces an aggressive, guttural sound.
event.rules: When blown, roll 1D6 for each group of Monsters on the Board (a group being defined as all those Monsters of the same type e.g. Orcs or Skaven). On a score of 4, 5 or 6 that group of Monsters attacks another group of Monsters this Turn (determine randomly) rather than the Warriors. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Horn of Dominion
event.flavor: This Norse horn produces a highly unnerving chord.
event.rules: When blown, all of the Warrior on the Board get +1 Strength for one Turn. (RPG: In addition, all of the Monsters on the same Board Section who are carrying a Rider become disorientated and suffer -1 Attack for one Turn. This does not affect the Rider, however, who may attack as normal.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Horn of Panic
event.flavor: This jewel-encrusted silver horn has ancient runes engraved upon it.
event.rules: When the horn is blown, roll 1D6 for every group of Monsters on the Board (a group being defined as all those Monsters of the same type e.g. Orcs or Skaven). On a score of 6, that particular group flees the battle. The Warriors do not receive any gold for Monsters that flee. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Horn of Resilience
event.flavor: This brass horn is said to originate in the Kingdoms of Ind.
event.rules: When blown, the magical power of this horn allows any Warrior on the Board to enter a hypnotic trance and heal themselves if they choose. The horn may only be used if there are no Monsters on the Board. Entering the trance takes one full Turn, during which the Warrior may do nothing else. At the end of the Turn each Warrior who entered the trance has 1D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Horn of Shielding
event.flavor: This large rusty warhorn shows signs of having been carried in many a battle.
event.rules: When blown, the mystical power of the horn places a magical shield around each Warrior, cloaking them in a _ near impenetrable cowl of raw magic. The Warriors can only be hit by Monsters scoring a natural 6 To Hit. The effects of the horn last for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Hounds of Grimnair Icon
event.flavor: The air is filled with an eerie howling and incorporeal shadows hurl themselves at the Warrior's foes.
event.rules: The stone allows a Warrior to summon 1D3 Hounds of Grimnair. The Warrior may choose which Monster each Hound attacks and it doesn't matter if there are any open squares next to target as the Hounds are immaterial beasts. A Hound attacks its target each Turn. It hits on a D6 roll of 6 and causes 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. If a 1 or 2 is rolled for the Hound's Attack or its target is killed, the Hound vanishes. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Ice Shield of Jana
event.flavor: This magical shield was carried by Norse Barbarian Jana the Unforgiving and helped protect her tribe from a rampaging Fire Dragon. Icy crystals protrude from the surface of this shield generating a soft mist around it.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this shield they get +1 Toughness (RPG: or they get +2 Toughness against fire-based Attacks). PERMANENT

event.name: Ice Tomb Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior's chill breath fills the room, coalescing around a single Monster and encasing it in a solid tomb of ice. Pick any Monster within the bearer's Line of Sight and roll 1D6.
event.rules: If the score exceeds the target's Toughness, it is encased ina sarcophagus of ice and may not move or fight. While entombed, target cannot be attacked. Roll 1D6 at the beginning of each Monsters' Phase. If the score is less than or equal to the target's Toughness, it frees itself. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Icon of Agility
event.flavor: This sturdy jewelled icon twists and turns in the hand of its bearer.
event.rules: When used, this icon allows the Warrior to add +1 to their roll to Escape from Pinning. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Icon of Combat
event.flavor: This redstone icon is chillingly cold to the touch.
event.rules: When used, the icon allows the bearer to shove a Monster out of their way. Roll 1D6 and add the Warrior's Strength. If the total is greater than the Monster's Strength it is pushed back into any one of the three squares behind it that is unoccupied. Having pushed their foe back, the Warrior moves into the square that was occupied by the Monster and may now make their normal Attacks. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Icon of Determination
event.flavor: This small jewelled icon gleams with a cold light. This small icon may be placed upon a shield, melding itself permanently with the surface.
event.rules: Once per Adventure, this icon allows the Warrior to ignore the Damage from a single blow. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Icon of Direction
event.flavor: This icon gives the Warrior an impressive sense of direction even in the depths of the darkest dungeon.
event.rules: If the Warrior bearing this icon flees the Dungeon, they may make two rolls on the Escaping the Dungeon Table and choose the best result. In addition, if the bearer is the leader with Lantern and an Event (RPG: or Travelling Hazard) indicates they are lost, roll 1D6. If the score is a 3, 4, 5 or 6, they may ignore it. PERMANENT

event.name: Icon of Obliteration
event.flavor: This jeweled icon radiates great destructive energy.
event.rules: A Warrior may use this icon once per Turn to attempt to destroy one item carried by an adjacent Monster. Roll 1D6. If the score is a 5 or 6, the item is destroyed. The icon lasts until used successfully or until the Warrior rolls a 1 when attemping to use it, both of which render the icon useless and worthless. LASTS UNTIL USED SUCCESSFULLY OR UNTIL A 1 IS ROLLED

event.name: Incense of Healing
event.flavor: This small, decorative urn is covered with magical symbols and runes.
event.rules: When opened, the urn discharges a fragrant cloud of vapour that acts as a healing potion. Every Warrior on the same Board Section as the urn has 2D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Invisibility Scroll
event.flavor: With a shimmer of light, the Warrior's outline slowly fades until they are completely invisible.
event.rules: This spell allows the Warrior bearing the scroll to become invisible for one Turn. While invisible the Warrior may automatically Escape from Pinning and carry out any action except attack an opponent: moving, healing, etc. are therefore valid actions, while firing a bow, pushing a Monster into a pit, casting offensive spells, etc. are not. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Iron Skin Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior bearing the scroll is protected by a magical second skin created by the Iron Skin spell.
event.rules: When used, the Warrior with the scroll gets +2 Toughness for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Javelin
event.flavor: Bearing magical sigils this slender silver javelin glitters in the darkness.
event.rules: This javelin may be thrown as a Strength 4 missile weapon. If the target is successfully hit, and is standing directly in front of, and adjacent to, a wall, roll an extra 1D6 after rolling for Damage. On a score of 5 or 6 the javelin causes normal Damage and pins the target to the wall. A pinned creature may do nothing for the rest of the Turn as it struggles to free itself. The javelin can be retrieved at the end of the Combat. USE ONCE PER COMBAT

event.name: Jong's Magic Cards
event.flavor: Huayi Jong was a sorcerer from Cathay often sought out for his arcane abilities. He invented these cards for his amusement, often demanding that an employer draw one as part the contract for his services.
event.rules: A Warrior who finds these cards feels compelled to draw one immediately (RPG: and at the beginning of each Adventure). Roll 1D6 to see what effect the magic card has on the Warrior: 1 -1D3 Starting Wounds 2 -1 Strength 3 +1 Weapon Skill 4 +1 Strength 5 +1 Toughness 6 +1 Attack The effect lasts until the end of the Adventure. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Jugglers Clubs
event.flavor: These surprisingly heavy juggling clubs hide a potent secret. There are 1D6 juggling clubs filled with explosive black powder.
event.rules: Each club can be thrown at any time at an enemy within the Warrior's Line of Sight where it may explode upon impact. Once thrown, roll 1D6 for the Monster and if the score is a 5 or 6, the club remains intact and the Monster immediately throws it back at the Warrior! In that case, roll 1D6 for the Warrior with the same rules listed above. This process continues until either the Warrior or the Monster rolls a 1, 2, 3 or 4, whereupon the club explodes causing 2D6 Wounds. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Kill Krazy Total Brew
event.flavor: Steam rises from the frothy surface of this foul-smelling liquid.
event.rules: Any Dwarf will recognise it with grudging respect as the product of the Orc Kill Krazy Brew Boyz. No sane Warrior would contemplate drinking the brew, but if they did... There is enough brew for four drinks and each unused drink is worth 125 gold. If a Warrior drinks, roll 1D6: 1 Dead! The Warrior's head explodes in a colourful and noisy fashion. 2 Mindless! The Warrior falls to the floor, fluid leaking from their ears. They ignore all Damage from blows they take for 1D6 Turns, but may do nothing at all. 3 Zonked! The Warrior staggers around in an uncontrolled fashion. Until a 4, 5 or 6 is rolled in the Power Phase, the Warrior may do nothing except wander along blearily behind the others. If attacked, they are at Weapon Skill 1. 4-5 Fortified! The coarse liquor fires up the Warrior's blood, invigorating them whilst stripping the skin off the roof of their mouth. They have 2D6 Wounds restored, but may not talk for the next 1D6 Turns. 6 The Warrior gurgles mindlessly for a moment as the brew reorganizes their internal organs, then a feeling of new-found strength washes over them. They have 1D6 Wounds restored, their Weapon Skill is permanently reduced by -1, but they cause an extra dice of Damage every time they hit. DISCARD WHEN ALL DRUNK

event.name: Kingshield of Tilea
event.flavor: King Esteban of Estalia won a famous battle against the Undead of Lahmia, and attributed his legendary invulnerability to the shield he bore. Its past is shrouded in mystery, but the kings of Tilea have always carried it into battle.
event.rules: A Warrior bearing this shield gets +1 Toughness. In addition, the bearer may ignore all the effects from any one Attack made against them, whatever its origin. PERMANENT/USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Lava Boots
event.flavor: These unconventional boots glow like molten lava.
