event.rules: While a Warrior is wearing these boots, they gain a special Fire Stomp Attack which causes Wounds as normal with no modifiers for Armour. However, the boots are cumbersome and so the wearer suffers -1 Movement. PERMANENT

event.name: Lesser Antidote
event.flavor: The liquid in this small bottle is thin like water and has a floral aroma.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion has 1D3 Wounds restored. (RPG: In addition, a Warrior who drink this antidote has 1 point restored to any one Characteristic that had previously been reduced for any reason. This potion cannot restore Wounds that have been permanently reduced.) USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Levitate Scroll
event.flavor: A crackling sound fills the room as the Warrior raises themselves aloft on a column of coruscating power.
event.rules: When a Warrior uses this scroll, pick any Warrior on the Board. For one Turn the target levitates. A levitating Warrior can only be attacked with missile weapons or spells. They cannot move, however, and may not fight in hand-to-hand Combat. Their square remains impassable, just as if they were standing in it normally. They may levitate out of a pit. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Lifebringer Scroll
event.flavor: Blazing fire leaps from the Warrior's eyes, striking the Warriors and bathing them in a corona of energy that closes their wounds. Pick any number of Warriors on the Board, including the Warrior bearing the scroll. Roll 1D6 for each Warrior chosen. Each Warrior has that number of wounds restored.
event.rules: If any two or more of the dice rolled come up with the same number, the spell fails and none of the Warriors have any Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Lifestealer Talisman
event.flavor: This skull-headed talisman is imbued with the properties of the dreaded Lifestealer spell. The Warrior with the talisman can steal Wounds from a nearby Monster to heal themselves.
event.rules: The bearer may choose one adjacent Monster who immediately suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. The bearer then has the same number of Wounds restored. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Lifestone
event.flavor: The Lifestone has the power to drain the life energy of others and transfer it to its wearer.
event.rules: Upon invoking the Lifestone choose any other Warrior on the Board. The bearer now has the same number of Wounds as that Warrior, while they now have the number of Wounds the bearer had. In effect, their Wounds are swapped. The Lifestone may never be used to take a Warrior above their Starting Wounds, which remain as they were. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Light of Courage
event.flavor: This phial is filled with a glowing white liquid which lights the way in the darkness just as the Lantern does.
event.rules: Once this phial is opened, the bearer can use it to explore just as if they carried the Lantern. The power of the phial will be exhausted after one Adventure, or if the Warrior carrying the phial is reduced to zero Wounds. LASTS FOR ONE ADVENTURE

event.name: Lightning Bolt Scroll
event.flavor: Raw power arcs across the Warrior's fingertips and a bolt of white energy streaks from their eyes toward their opponent.
event.rules: When a Warrior uses this scroll, any single Monster in the bearer's Line of Sight immediately suffers 2D6 Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Lightning Fire Ring
event.flavor: As soon as this ring is slipped over a finger, it shrinks slightly to fit, and a lightning rune starts to glow coldly on its upper surface.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing the Lightning Fire Ring can fire a bolt of lightning at any Monster within their Line of Sight. The bolt hits automatically and causes 5D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Lock Tools
event.flavor: This set of tools is designed for unlocking things that were meant to stay secured. Lock tools allow the user to open any lock as long as it is not magical or the rules of the lock specifically state otherwise. To see if the user can open a lock, roll 1D6. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 the lock opens. On a score of 2 or 3 the lock refuses to open at the moment, though the user may try again next Turn.
event.rules: On a score of 1, the lock tools are snapped off in the lock and are now useless. PERMANENT

event.name: Luckstone of Anurandel
event.flavor: Anurandel was a Wood Elf Sorceress, renowned for her peaceful demeanour, sunny disposition and hatred of battle.
event.rules: She fashioned many items to aid her followers should they be assailed by dark forces. This plain, smooth stone bears an Elf rune. It allows the bearer to re-roll any one dice roll once per Adventure. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Lucky Talisman
event.flavor: Hanging from a fine chain, this palm-sized talisman is said to bring good luck.
event.rules: A Warrior may use the Lucky Talisman at any time. Any Attack made while using the Lucky Talisman will automatically hit. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Mace of No Mercy
event.flavor: The edges of this mace have been expertly sharpened so that it inflicts more damage upon impact This mace causes +1D3 Wounds if the To Hit roll is a natural 6.
event.rules: PERMANENT

event.name: Mace of Thrashing
event.rules: A Warrior feels extra aggressive with this mace in their hand. While using this mace, if the Warrior's final regular Attack in a Turn hits and causes at least one Wound (after all deductions), they may make an extra Attack on the Monster again. The Warrior may Keep making an extra Attack against the Monster until they miss or fail to cause a Wound. PERMANENT

event.name: Magic Arrers
event.flavor: These arrows are carved with strange Goblin runes. The arrows are enchanted, but are somewhat unpredictable.
event.rules: When fired, roll 1D6 below instead of rolling To Hit: 1 The arrow automatically hits one of the Warriors (determined randomly) for 1D6+3 Wounds. 2-5 The arrow automatically hits the Monster and causes 1D6+3 Wounds. 6 The arrow automatically hits the Monster causing 2D6+3 Wounds. There are 6 arrows. Each arrow can only be used once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Magic Beans
event.flavor: Glowing and vibrating in their hand, the Warrior can see that these are no ordinary beans!
event.rules: A Warrior may eat a Magic Bean at any time. Roll 1D6 to see what effect the bean has on them for one Turn: 1 +1 To Hit. 2 +1 Movement. 3 +1 Strength. 4 +1 Toughness. 5 +1 Attack. 6 +1D6 Wounds when determining Damage. There are 1D6 beans and each one is worth 50 gold. DISCARD WHEN ALL EATEN

event.name: Magic Potion
event.flavor: This small glass bottle bears strange inscriptions in some long- forgotten magical language.
event.rules: When a Warrior drinks the Magic Potion, roll 1D6 to determine what it is: 1 Poison: suffer 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. 2 Poison: suffer 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. 3 Rainbow Potion: the Warrior's flesh becomes rainbow striped! 4 Healing Potion: restores 1D6 of the Warrior's Wounds. 5 Healing Potion: restores 2D6 of the Warrior's Wounds. 6 Healing Potion: restores the Warrior to full Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Magic Sword
event.flavor: This blade glows with a yellow light and is slightly warm to the touch.
event.rules: This fine sword is worth 25 gold. (RPG: This weapon is magical.) PERMANENT

event.name: Magical Quiver
event.flavor: This quiver is made from soft leather and has magical runes branded into its surface.
event.rules: This fine quiver is worth 25 gold. (RPG: Any arrows or crossbow bolts placed in this quiver immediately become enchanted so they can affect Monsters that can only be hit with magical weapons.) PERMANENT

event.name: Mangler Helm
event.flavor: Spikes protrude from the top of this helm, making it as dangerous as it is protective.
event.rules: While wearing this helm, a Warrior gets +1 Toughness. In addition, if all of the Warrior's regular Attacks hit this Turn, they receive a special Helm Attack. Roll To Hit as normal. If the helm Attack hits, it causes normal Damage. PERMANENT

event.name: Map of Finding
event.flavor: This parchment glows with a pale light but appears blank.
event.rules: However, it may be of value to someone who understands how its magic works. This parchment is worth 50 gold. (RPG: A Warrior may use this map if they wish to find a Special Location in a Settlement without having to roll the dice. They only need to say the name f the place and, if the Settlement would normally include it, the map reveals exactly where it is. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Marsh Lights Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior sends a sparkling, dancing light down the corridor, drawing their opponents away.
event.rules: This spell may be cast when Monsters are about to be placed on the Board. Roll 1D6 for each Monster that appears. On a score of 6 that Monster follows the marsh lights away from the Warrior and isn't placed on the Board at all. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Mask of Horror
event.flavor: This bizarre mask depicts the wicked face of a daemon.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears this mask takes on the appearance of a daemonic creature. Any Chaos or Daemonic Monster attacking the Warrior suffers -2 To Hit. If another Warrior is adjacent to the mask wearer and rolls a 1 To Hit, however, they have mistakenly hit the mask wearer instead, who suffers Damage as normal! This mask cannot be worn at the same time as a helmet. PERMANENT

event.name: Midnight Armour
event.flavor: A dark cloud begins to swirl around the wearer of this black leather armour.
event.rules: While wearing this armour a Warrior gets +1 Toughness. Once per Aventure, the armour can produce a black cloud that shrouds the Warrior in darkness. For one Turn Monsters only hit the wearer on a natural To Hit roll of 6. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Moradrels Boots
event.flavor: Moradrel was a skilled Elf Mage who created many powerful magic items, most of which have been lost or destroyed down the long years.
event.rules: While wearing these boots a Warrior's Movement Characteristic is 1D6+1 Roll each Turn to see how far the Warrior can move. PERMANENT

event.name: Morning Star of Fracasse
event.flavor: This flail seems to have a will of its own, trying to entangle nearby weapons.
event.rules: If a Warrior using this weapon rolls a natural 6 To Hit, the flail entwines itself around one object the creature struck is holding, yanking it from their grasp. The Monster may do nothing for one Turn as they retrieve it. PERMANENT

event.name: Mushroom Medley
event.flavor: One who holds these brightly coloured mushrooms in their hands feels a strange tingling sensation in their fingers. There are 1D3+1 Mushrooms and a Warrior may eat only one each Turn.
event.rules: If they do, roll 1D6 to see what happens: 1-2 Hallucinogen. Confused, the Warrior attacks one random adjacent model this Turn. 3-4 Panacea. A sense of calm comes over the Warrior and they have 1D6 Wounds restored. 5-6 Stimulant. The Warrior's muscles begin to bulge and they get +3 Strength for the rest of the Turn. DISCARD WHEN ALL EATEN

event.name: Nightmare Shield
event.rules: Any foe whose eyes fall upon this shield sees the haunting vision of their own death. A Warrior carrying this shield gets +1 Toughness. In addition, the bearer may force a Monster to re-roll one of its Attacks against them, but they must accept the outcome of the second roll. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Norse Talisman
event.flavor: Carved into this talisman is the image of a warrior at the heart of a ferocious storm.
event.rules: When the power of this talisman is invoked, it allows the Barbarian to go Berserk automatically. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Obsidian Blade
event.flavor: This sword is made from the solidified blackness of the void, explaining its ability to destroy any armour it touches.
event.rules: After a Warrior has made a successful Attack using this sword which actually wounded their opponent, roll 1D6. On a score of 5 or 6 the sword destroys the target's Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Ogre Slayer
event.flavor: This brutal, broad-bladed axe is a powerful weapon and is almost certainly of Dwarf origin.
event.rules: While using this two-handed axe a Warrior gets +2 Strength (+3 if they are a Dwarf). PERMANENT

event.name: Ogre Strength Scroll
event.flavor: Calling on the forces of magic, the Warrior bearing the scroll uses the power to increase the target's strength tremendously.
event.rules: Pick any Warrior on the Board. That Warrior gets +2 Strength for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Old Rope
event.flavor: This rope is old, worn and has begun to fray.
event.rules: The rope can be used to escape from a pit. After each use, roll 1D6. On a score of 1, 2, 3 or 4 the rope breaks and must be discarded. PERMANENT

event.name: Orb of Might
event.flavor: This black orb glistens dully and is far heavier than it looks. This orb contains 1D6 points of Power that the Wizard can use in the same way as his Power Tokens. Place a D6 on top of this card to show the orb's current Power.
event.rules: Once all of the points are used up it is useless and worthless. It cannot be recharged. The orb is worth 50 gold per unused point of Power. DISCARD WHEN DRAINED

event.name: Orb of Obstruction
event.flavor: This orb is affixed to a claw-like stand that grips the hand of whoever holds it.
event.rules: When the power of the orb is invoked, no model on the same Board Section as the bearer may use any ability, magic or item that allows them to fly for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Orb of Power
event.flavor: The surface of this glittering silver orb, constantly swirls as if in motion and exudes a distinctive magical aura.
event.rules: This orb contains 1D6 points of Power that the Wizard can use the same way as his Power Tokens. Once all the points are used up it is useless and worthless. (RPG: The Wizard can recharge the Orb at the Font of Power, just like the Wizard's Staff.) USE ONCE THEN RECHARGE

event.name: Orb of Sigmar
event.flavor: The Grand Theogonist Wilhelm used this sparkling orb in his battle against the Vampire Count Vlad von Carstein.
event.rules: When the power of the Orb is invoked, no Necromantic Magic may be used by any model on the same Board Section as the bearer for the next 1D6 Turns. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Parrying Blade
event.flavor: This sword darts forward of its own volition to meet the weapon of an attacker, stopping the blow from hitting home.
event.rules: Once per Turn a Warrior using this sword may attempt to parry one hand-to-hand Attack that would otherwise hit them. Roll 1D6. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 the attack is magically turned away and has no effect. (RPG: The sword gives the Warrior the Parry 4+ ability.) USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Pearl Necklace
event.flavor: This long pear! necklace is exquisite and will fetch a fair price when sold.
event.rules: The necklace is worth 1D6x10 gold. (RPG: The Warrior may try and sell the Pearl Necklace to the General Store. Roll 1D6 and multiply the result by 10 to see how much the trader will offer you for it. However, if you roll a 1, the necklace is fake, and the trader refuses to buy it. You will have to try and sell it at another Settlement.) DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Phantasm Sword
event.flavor: The magic sigils on this sword glow brightly whenever an evil spirit draws near.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this two-handed sword they get +2 Strength. In addition, when used against Monsters with the Ethereal ability, the wielder gets +1 To Hit and causes Double Damage. PERMANENT

event.name: Pipes of Doom
event.flavor: Playing these pipes produces a hauntingly beautiful chord.
event.rules: When played, the sound from these pipes echo for one Turn. During that time every Warrior on the same Board Section as the player only miss with their regular Attacks if their To Hit roll isa 1. If a Warrior rolls a natural 1 To Hit, however, they blunder their Attack so badly that they hit themselves instead and suffer normal Damage. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Pit of Despair Scroll
event.flavor: Roaring words of power the bearer of the scroll stamps their foot into the ground, cracking the floor with a loud boom.
event.rules: Place the Pit of Despair marker on any 2 square by 2 square area on the Board. Roll 1D6 for each model standing in the pit area. On a 1 or 2 it falls into the pit and is killed. On a 3, 4, 5 or 6 it scrambles out of the way - put it in an empty square on this or any adjacent Board Section. If there are no empty squares available, the model falls into the pit anyway. Once the pit is in place, no model may enter the squares it covers. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Plergits Stabba
event.flavor: This wickedly sharp and very thin bladed dagger is designed for slipping between armour joints.
event.rules: A Warrior may use this dagger to make an extra attack by rolling 1D6: 1 The attack misses. 2-4 The attack hits causing 2D6+Strength Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. 5-6 The attacks hits causing 3D6 + Strength Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Potion of Alchemy
event.flavor: The pink liquid in this small glass bottle constantly fizzes and bubbles.
event.rules: At the end of the Adventure, a Warrior may sell this potion to an Alchemist for 1D6x40 gold. (RPG: To sell this potion, the Warrior must first find the Alchemist's Laboratory Special Location in a Settlement!) DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Potion of Battle
event.flavor: This robust, pocket-sized bottle is filled with a sparkling yellow liquid.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1 Attack for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Climbing
event.flavor: This tiny bottle provides a big effect. The liquid is thick Ike honey and tastes as sweet.
event.rules: A Warrior who drink this potion may climb walls or over obstacles for one Turn. This potion does not affect the distance that a Warrior may move. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Disguise
event.flavor: This black liquid has no taste and leaves no trace of moisture on the lips.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion will not be attacked and automatically Escapes from Pinning as long as they do not initiate Combat. As soon as the Warrior attacks a target in any way the potion's effects wear off. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Endurance
event.flavor: This small bottle of sluggish, orange liquid is surprisingly heavy.
event.rules: A Warrior may drink this potion to ignore the Wounds from a single blow that might otherwise kill them. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Flight
event.flavor: The contents of this bottle bubble and pop. This effervescent liquid goes down easily and leaves the Warrior feeling light- headed and light of body!
event.rules: After drinking this potion the Warrior levitates a few inches above the ground while moving. While airborne the Warrior may pass over chasms, pits, etc unhindered and anyone who attacks them suffers -1 To Hit. The effects last for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Flying
event.flavor: The grey surface of this thick necked bottle cannot conceal the golden liquid within.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion may fly for one Turn. While airborne they move 1D6+2 squares, can fly over obstacles and may automatically Escape from Pinning. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Fortitude
event.flavor: A deep red liquid fills this crystal decanter.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1D6 Wounds. These additional Wounds can take the Warrior above their Starting Wounds score. If that is the case, these extra Wounds are temporary. Once they are lost, they are lost for good. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Healing
event.flavor: This ornate glass bottle contains a blue coloured liquid with a sweet, fruity smell.
event.rules: Testing with the smallest sip reveals that it is a potion of healing. There is enough Potion of Healing in this bottle to restore two Warriors to full Wounds. When the first dose is taken, flip this card upside-down; when the second dose is taken, discard it. USE TWICE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Instability
event.flavor: This fine crystal decanter is full of a glowing orange liquid.
event.rules: When drunk, this potion shifts the dimensional position of the Warrior, making them _ ethereal and_ insubstantial. They automatically Escape from Pinning, but may not take any offensive action, cast magic or be attacked for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Invisibility
event.flavor: This vial contains a multi-coloured liquid that swirls sluggishly and gives off heady vapours once the seal is broken.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion becomes invisible for one Turn. While invisible the Warrior cannot be attacked or cast spells, but may otherwise fight as normal. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Keensight
event.flavor: A small magical icon decorates this bottle, inside of which is a fiery yellow liquid.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion may make a number of missile attacks equal to their Attack Characteristic this Turn, rather than the standard one shot per Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Lightning Blades
event.flavor: This tiny glass bottle is full of a bitter purple liquid.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1 To Hit (RPG: +1 To Hit per Battle-level) for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Magic
event.flavor: This small bottle contains a cloudy purple substance.
event.rules: When drunk, this potion restores 1D6 of the Wizard's Power Tokens. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Might
event.flavor: An intoxicating liquid flows from this bottle, bringing a sense of power and might to whoever drinks it.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1D6 Strength for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Pain
event.flavor: This large bottle seems to barely contain the bubbling orange liquid within.
event.rules: A Warrior may drink this potion to ignore the Wounds from a single blow that might otherwise kill them. In addition, it the Warrior has 2D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Power
event.flavor: This effervescent yellow-orange liquid has a sour taste, but leaves the Warrior feeling powerful.
event.rules: When a Warrior drinks this potion, their next regular Attack causes maximum Damage if it hits. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Preservation
event.flavor: Inside this bottle is a lucent orange liquid.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion has 1D6 Wounds restored. In addition, the drinker will not suffer any Wounds that occur at the end of the Turn (RPG: the drinker does not suffer any Fatal Damage this Turn). USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Rage
event.flavor: A fiery reddish-orange solution churns in this flask.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion flies into a furious rage. They double their regular Attacks and suffer -1 To Hit for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Respiration
event.flavor: The hue of this coral coloured liquid seems to shift and change with how the bottle is held.
event.rules: When drunk, this potion allows the Warrior to ignore anything that might affect their respiration, such as water or poison gas. The effects last for 1D6 Turns. There is enough liquid for four drinks. If sold the potion is worth 100 gold for every drink still left in the bottle. DISCARD WHEN ALL DRUNK

event.name: Potion of Strength
event.flavor: The bright red liquid in this bottle swishes about by its own volition.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1 Strength for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Swiftness
event.flavor: Inside this stoppered glass bottle is a glossy blue liquid much thicker than water.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1D6 Movement and may automatically Escape from Pinning. The effects of the potion last for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Toughness
event.flavor: This shining bottle is full of a thick purple liquid.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +1 Toughness for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Water Walking
event.flavor: This effervescent liquid has a salty tang reminiscent of the sea.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion may walk on water for one Turn, moving at a rate of (3 x their normal Movement) squares per Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Potion of Weapon Mastery
event.flavor: The warm amber liquid in this stoppered glass phial goes down smoothly and leaves a pleasant aftertaste.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion gets +2 To Hit and causes +2D6 Wounds when attacking with a missile weapon or in hand-to-hand Combat. The effects of the potion last for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Pouch of Gold
event.flavor: The Warrior hears the pleasant sound of coins jingling as they shake this small, leather pouch.
event.rules: This pouch contains 3 gold pieces. RECORD THEN DISCARD

event.name: Precious Icon
event.flavor: This mysterious, unusual icon might be worth something to someone.
event.rules: The casket contains an icon which belongs to the Elders of a far distant village. After the Adventure, the icon may be sold back to the Elders for 1D6x200 gold. (RPG: Obviously the Warrior must first visit a Village to claim their reward!) DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Pritty Stonez
event.flavor: This small drawstring bag contains some _ ordinary-looking stones.
event.rules: When the Warrior looks through the 'stones', roll 1D6 below: 1-2 They are indeed pretty, but ordinary, stones worth nothing. 3-4 Mixed with normal stones are 1D6 gold nuggets wroth 25 gold each. 5-6 Mixed with normal stones are 1D6 gemstones worth 100 gold each. RECORD THEN DISCARD

event.name: Prophet Shield
event.flavor: This shield allows the bearer to anticipate attacks made from a distance.
event.rules: A Warrior bearing this shield gets +1 Toughness. In addition, all incoming missile Attacks against the bearer suffer -1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Protection Ring
event.flavor: This small ring has the image of a shield engraved on its uppermost surface.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this ring gets +1 Toughness. PERMANENT

event.name: Quake Scroll
event.flavor: This dusty scroll is inscribed with magic runes and sigils that contain words of power.
event.rules: This scroll can be used at any time, and causes a 2 square by 2 square area of any one Board Section to cave in. Use the Cave- in marker to mark the area affected. Any Warrior or Monster caught in the area covered by the cave-in suffers 2D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Quarg Horn
event.flavor: Who created this very unusual, gold-leaf covered, baroque horn is a mystery. This horn can only be used during the Hunting Settlement Event.
event.rules: When they are alone in the forest, the Warrior may blow the horn and roll 1D6: 1-5 The horn makes an awful noise, like a flatulent ogre. Nothing happens. 6 The horn makes a beautiful, clear sound. A fabulous beast bounds out of the bushes and fawns at the Warrior's feet. They have captured a Quarg! They can sell the Quarg for 1000 gold, but no one will buy the horn off them... ROLEPLAYING GAME ONLY PERMANENT

event.name: Rapid Fire Bracelets
event.flavor: These bracelets were created by the Elves to complement the fabled Silver Band of Loren.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing these bracelets gets +1 Attack when using a missile weapon. PERMANENT

event.name: Reaper Sword
event.flavor: This mighty sword is sharper than a razor. Its keen blade glistens in the light of the lantern, and even in the shadows it shimmers with an eerie inner light.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this sword they get +2 Strength. PERMANENT

event.name: Rebound Scroll
event.flavor: As the bearer of this scroll chants the words of this spell, a shimmering mirror of power surrounds the target, protecting them from harm.
event.rules: Pick any Warrior on the Board. Each time they are physically struck by a blow this Turn, roll 1D6. On a score of 6 all the Damage from the blow is rebounded onto whoever caused it. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Relic Blade
event.flavor: This holy blade is an artefact of great religious significance within the Empire, and was reputed to have been used by the realm's mightiest heroes in numerous battles.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this sword they get +2 To Hit. (RPG: If the To Hit roll is a natural 1, however, the Warrior misses and is so off-balance that they lose any remaining Attacks they have this Turn.) PERMANENT

event.name: Ricochet Helm
event.flavor: Magic runes of warding are emblazoned upon this otherwise smooth helm.
event.rules: The wearer of this helm gets +1 Toughness. In addition, each time the wearer is hit by a missile attack, roll 1D6. If the score is a 6, the attack ricochets off and hits a random Monster within the wearer's Line of Sight instead. But if the result is a 1, the attacks pings off and hits a random Warrior within the wearer's Line of Sight instead! PERMANENT

event.name: Ring of Anurandel
event.flavor: Anurandel was a Wood Elf Sorceress, renowned for her peaceful demeanour, sunny disposition and hatred of battle. She fashioned many items to aid her followers should they be assailed by dark forces.
event.rules: If the bearer of the ring takes no offensive action this Turn, the ring will restore 1D6 Wounds at the end of the turn. If the score is a 1 or 2 the ring's power is drained for the rest of the Adventure. PERMANENT

event.name: Ring of Dadaan
event.flavor: This ring crackles with power and feels unusually heavy for its size. The Ring of Dadaan allows a Warrior to cast a spell. Take one of the Wizard's Starting Spell Cards at random: this is the spell that is stored in the ring.
event.rules: The bearer of the ring may cast the stored spell automatically at any time. After use, the ring is drained of all magic and becomes worthless. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Ring of Invisibility
event.flavor: Slipping this ring on, the wearer fades from sight.
event.rules: While wearing this ring, a Warrior is invisible and cannot be attacked, although they may fight as normal. The ring contains enough power to Keep the bearer invisible for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Ring of Life
event.flavor: Within the central gemstone of this silver, jewel-encrusted ring, a tiny flame burns brightly.
event.rules: The ring has the power to heal grievous wounds. It may only be used to heal another Warrior (not the bearer) if they are on zero Wounds. To use the ring, roll 1D6. On a roll of 1 the flame flickers and dies, and has no effect. On any other score the Warrior is restored to full Wounds. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Ring of Power
event.flavor: This simple band of stone slips easily onto a Warrior's finger, contracting until it is a perfect fit.
event.rules: While wearing this ring one of the Warrior's Characteristics is increased by +1. The Warrior may choose to increase Movement, Weapon Skill, Ballistic Skill, Strength, Toughness, Initiative, Attacks, Luck, Willpower or Escape Pinning. The Warrior must choose which Characteristic is affected the first time they put on the ring. PERMANENT

event.name: Ring of Solitude
event.flavor: This silver ring is inset with tiny emeralds in the shape of leaves.
event.rules: When drawing a Warrior Counter to determine who the target is for a group of Monsters who all attack a single Warrior (RPG: Monsters who have the Gang Up ability), the first time the bearer's counter is pulled out they may put it back and draw again. If it comes up a second time, they are attacked as normal. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Ring of Sure Seeing
event.flavor: This ring has a large gem set in its surface that, in times of danger, warns of what is to come.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this ring may swap an Event Card that has just been drawn for another. Shuffle ALL the other Event Cards together (including any that have already been used) to make a new Event Deck. Take the top card and carry on as usual. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Rod of Wounds
event.flavor: This baton is actually a powerful rod that can give or take life. The Warrior wielding this rod may choose up to 3 targets and roll 3D6.
event.rules: The result is the number of points the Warrior may use to heal the targets as they see fit. But note that the points of healing from a single dice cannot be divided and must be spent on a single Warrior, and all targets must be healed. If two of the dice come up a 1, however, all of the targets suffer 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. When the rod is found it contains 1D6 charges. Each use drains one charge. The rod is worth 75 gold per unused charge. DISCARD WHEN DRAINED

event.name: Rune of Death
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Death into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Death itself is permanent. For one Attack per Adventure, this weapon causes +2D6 Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Destruction
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Destruction into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Destruction itself is permanent. Once per Adventure, the wielder of this weapon can double their regular Attacks for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Fortitude
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Fortitude into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Fortitude itself is permanent. At the beginning of each Adventure the wielder of this weapon gets +1D6 extra Starting Wounds. These Wounds are temporary and once they are lost, they are lost for the rest of the Adventure. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Fury
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Fury into the blade and then vanishes. The Rue of Fury itself is permanent. While wielding this weapon a Warrior gains +1 Attack. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Magic
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Magic into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Magic itself is permanent. The rune glows dully, and Keeps the blade sharp. From now on, this weapon is treated as being magical. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Prowess
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Prowess into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Prowess itself is permanent. While wielding this weapon the Warrior gets +1 To Hit. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Slaying
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Slaying into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Slaying itself is permanent. For one Attack per Adventure this weapon will now inflict Double Damage when it strikes. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Smashing
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Smashing into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Smashing itself is permanent. This weapon now ignores 1 point of Armour when determining Damage. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Rune of Sure Striking
event.flavor: This stone of Dwarf construction is inscribed with a glowing rune.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Sure Striking into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Sure Striking itself is permanent. When rolling more than one Damage Dice, the wielder of this weapon may re-roll the Damage Dice that scores the lowest. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Sack of Gold
event.flavor: Although this sack is tattered, the gold coins within it still glisten.
event.rules: The sack contains 1D6x50 gold. RECORD THEN DISCARD

event.name: Salve of Mending
event.flavor: Inside a stone container is a thick red paste.
event.rules: If a Warrior applies this salve to themselves or one of their companions, it immediately restores 1D3 of the recipient's Wounds. If a natural 1 is rolled when determining how many Wounds are restored, the effects of the salve are complete. Otherwise, the salve will continue restoring 1D3 Wounds at the beginning on the next Turn. This process continues until a natural 1 is rolled when determining how many Wounds are restored. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Salve of Strength
event.flavor: This stoppered jade-stone phial contains a glittering bronze salve.
event.rules: A Warrior who uses this salve gets +1 Strength for 1D6 Turns. There is only enough salve in the phial for one application. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Sands of Time
event.flavor: The Mad Sorcerer of Araby, Abdul Alhazred, created this magical timepiece so that he could steal a powerful artefact from the Palace of the Wizard Caliph.
event.rules: When this hourglass is turned over, time stops. Every model on the Board, except the bearer of the hourglass, is frozen in time. The bearer may automatically Escape from Pinning and can do anything (move, heal, etc.) but may not take any offensive action. At the beginning of each Turn thereafter, the bearer must roll 1D6. If the score is a 1, 2 or 3, the sands have reached the bottom and time begins again. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Satchel of Shallya
event.flavor: This satchel has the mark of the Temple Hospice of Shallya in
event.rules: Altdorf and is usually carried by travelling priests. The Satchel contains 1D6 Bandages. Each bandage restores 3 Wounds. (RPG: At the end of each Adventure, any remaining Bandages in the satchel vanish. However, at the start of the next Adventure, the satchel will have magically replenished itself, and will contain 1D6 Bandages again!) 1D6 BANDAGES PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Sceptre of Docility
event.flavor: Alikahn the Keeper was an expert beast handler from Araby. This sceptre helped him control the may wild creatures that he kept in his menagerie.
event.rules: A Warrior who wields this sceptre as a weapon gets +1 To Hit with it. (RPG: In addition, if a Warrior wields the sceptre in Combat, Monsters on the same Board Section as the bearer are not subject to the Frenzy or Hate abilities.) PERMANENT

event.name: Sceptre of Ruination
event.flavor: This ram-headed scepter feels heavy in the hand when swung against certain foes.
event.rules: The sceptre may be wielded like a weapon, and causes Double Damage against any Chaos creatures. PERMANENT

event.name: Scroll of the Chimera
event.rules: When unrolled, words of power glow dully on this ancient parchment. The spell on this scroll gives the bearer the appearance of a ferocious monster. The scroll may be read at any time, causing any Monsters to be so terrified of the affected Warrior that they will suffer -2 To Hit against them. The spell lasts until a 1 or 2 is rolled in the Power Phase. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Second Chance Token
event.flavor: This mysterious token has a large, laughing skull in its center.
event.rules: The power of this curio may be used when a Counter is drawn randomly (such as a Warrior Counter, Catacombs Counter, Creep Counter, etc.) The bearer of this token may ignore the result and draw another one instead. The first counter drawn is then mixed back in with the others, as if it had never been drawn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Shield of Deliverance
event.flavor: This shield is of simple yet exquisite craftsmanship. It seems to be made of a substance stronger than steel, yet weighs little more than a sheet of parchment.
event.rules: A Warrior bearing this shield gets +1 Toughness. In addition, they may ignore the Damage from any two blows. The first time the shield is used, flip this card upside-down; when it is used a second time, discard it. USE TWICE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Silks of Cathay
event.flavor: Inside a long abandoned crate the Warriors discover elegant silks from the distant land of Cathay.
event.rules: There are 1D3 pieces of beautiful silk and each one will fetch 25 gold. (RPG: If sold in a Town, each piece is worth 50 gold. If sold ina City, each piece is worth 100 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Silver Band of Loren
event.flavor: This ring was created by the Elves to complement the fabled Rapid Fire Bracelets.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this ring gets +1 Ballistic Skill. PERMANENT

event.name: Silver Cubes of Ogham
event.flavor: These glowing silver cubes were fashioned from the Ogham Stones on the misty island of Albion.
event.rules: A Warrior may toss these cubes down at the feet of a single Monster during Combat by choosing as many D6 as they wish and rolling them all at the same time. For every dice that comes up a 6, the Monster suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. But for every dice that comes up a 1, the Warrior suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. If this reduces the Warrior to zero Wounds, they are dead and cannot be revived. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Silver Dagger
event.flavor: This dagger is made of pure silver and therefore highly sought after by Witch Hunters.
event.rules: A Warrior using this dagger gets +1 To Hit. The dagger is Strength 2 and can be used in hand-to-hand Combat or as a missile weapon. Against Undead and Chaos creatures the dagger is considered magical and causes Double Damage if the To Hit roll is a 5 or 6. If thrown, it may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. PERMANENT

event.name: Silver Sigil Sword
event.flavor: Doznes of magical runes symbolising freedom, capability and advantage have been etched onto this blade.
event.rules: While wielding this sword a Warrior gets +3 Initiative. In addition, the wielder may add +1 to their roll to Escape from Pinning. PERMANENT

event.name: Silver Stone
event.flavor: The Silver Stone imbues a weapon it touches with magical powers.
event.rules: The stone may be used once to permanently enchant a single weapon. The Silver Stone vanishes, but the affected weapon is now magical, and causes +1D6 Wounds on a To Hit roll of 6. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Silver-tipped Arrows
event.flavor: The head of these arrows are made from pure silver.
event.rules: These arrows cause +1 Wound. (RPG: If used against a Werewolf, these arrows cause Double Damage instead.) There are 1D3 arrows and each arrow may be used only once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Sky Arrows of Naloer
event.flavor: These magical arrows were enchanted long ago by an Elven mage.
event.rules: A Warrior using these arrows gets +1 To Hit and cause +1D3 Wounds when attacking Monsters with the F/y ability. There are 2D6 arrows and each may be used only once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Sleep Scroll
event.flavor: Murmuring quietly, the bearer of the scroll sends their opponents into an enchanted sleep.
event.rules: The bearer may target any Monster on the same Board Section by rolling 4D6. If the total score is more than the target's Starting Wounds it falls asleep for 1 Turn. The dice may be split between multiple targets. The bearer must declare how the dice are being split before rolling. If split, the total of the combined dice for each target must be greater than its Starting Wounds for the spell to work on that Monster. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Soulstone
event.flavor: The Soulstone captures the departing soul of the bearer, should they be slain. Someone with the correct knowledge can then restore the soul to their body, resurrecting the unfortunate person.
event.rules: If the Warrior with the Soulstone is killed, by whatever means, they can be resurrected once the Adventure is over. They lose any Treasure and gold they have accumulated during that Adventure, and are unchanged from the Warrior they were when they set off on the Adventure. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Spear of Precision
event.flavor: This hefty-looking spear has a wickedly sharp head.
event.rules: In addition to any other attacks they may have, a Warrior may throw this spear as a missile weapon at any time, at a target on the same Board Section as the wielder. To throw the spear, roll 1D6. On a 3, 4, 5 or 6 the Warrior has hit the target and causes 3D6 Wounds. They spear may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Speed Scroll
event.flavor: Breathing deeply, the Warrior uses the power of the scroll to speed up their movement.
event.rules: A Warrior who uses this scroll has their Movement doubled for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Spell Ring
event.rules: Any Wizard recognizes this potent ring as being capable of storing magical knowledge. Take one Starting Spell Card at random: this is the spell that is stored in the ring. The bearer of the ring may cast the stored spell automatically at any time. After use, the ring is drained and the Spell Card must be discarded. (RPG: If it is drained, the ring will slowly recharge itself. At the start of the next Adventure take a new Starting Spell Card to represent the new spell that is stored in the ring.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Spices of Araby
event.flavor: Araby, scorched land of sand and blazing sun, is home to some of the most learned men in the world.
event.rules: This earthenware pot is full of rich spices, and their pungent tang fills the air. The spices are worth 1D3x100 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Spiderweb Paste
event.flavor: This bottle is filled with a sparkling purple solution.
event.rules: A Warrior may throw this bottle as a missile weapon at any time with a Range of 4 squares. It hits automatically, shattering upon impact. Roll 1D6. If the score is equal to or greater than the target's Movement Characteristic, the target is truck in a pool of gooey paste reminiscent of a spider's web. They cannot move or perform any offensive actions for one Turn, and any Attacks made against them get +1 To Hit. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Spinebreaker
event.flavor: This fine weapon seems to magically reshape to fit into the wielder's hand perfectly.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this mace causes +1 Wound (RPG: +1 Wound per Battle-level) if their To Hit roll is a 5 or 6. PERMANENT

event.name: Spinning Top
event.flavor: This large cone-shaped device vibrates with energy. This metal cone may be placed on the ground during Combat where it spins out of control with an extraordinary amount of force. Roll 1D6 for each model on the Board Section Cincluding any Warrior).
event.rules: If the score is a 6 when rolling for a Monster, it is Knocked down and spends the next Monsters' Phase getting back up. Any Warrior attacking a fallen Monster gets +2 To Hit. If the score is a 1 when rolling for a Warrior, they are Knocked down, must spend one full Turn getting up and Monsters attacking them get +2 To Hit. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Stone Icon of Ghamaluk
event.flavor: Ghamaluk was a grand vizier of Araby and created a series of stone icons specifically to combat the Undead hordes amassed against him.
event.rules: Many of these icons have passed into the hands of the famous Witch Hunter Gunter Grafftag of Sylvania. This icon may be used to restore the bearer back to full Wounds. It fails to work while the bearer is on zero Wounds. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Stone of Bravery
event.flavor: This stone gives great confidence to the bearer, such that fear seems but a dream.
event.rules: This valuable semi-precious stone is worth 250 gold. (RPG: The bearer gets +1 to all psychology based tests such as Fear and Terror.) PERMANENT

event.name: Stone of Transmutation
event.flavor: This small, plain stone hangs from a delicate copper chain.
event.rules: The item may be used to transmute a single Monster into stone, killing it. To determine whether the stone works roll 1D6+1 (RPG: 1D6 + the Warrior's Battle-level). If the total is greater than the target Monster's current Wounds, it becomes a statue, otherwise the spell fails. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Stonebread
event.flavor: Dwarf stonebread is exactly what its name suggests - bread with the consistency of stone.
event.rules: Only a Dwarf would ever consider eating Stonebread, and they take a gruff satisfaction in the fact that only they can eat the stuff. Eating Stonebread is obviously no quick task. If a Dwarf does nothing for a Turn, except chew their way through a piece of Stonebread, at the end of the Warriors' Phase they have 1D6 Wounds restored. There are 1D6 pieces. DISCARD AFTER ALL EATEN

event.name: Stormhammer
event.flavor: Sparks fly from this warhammer each time it strikes.
event.rules: If a Warrior wielding this weapon rolls a natural 6 To Hit, in addition to normal Damage, the target is stunned and suffers - 1 Attack for one Turn. PERMANENT

event.name: Strength Scroll
event.flavor: The scroll bears the words for the Strength spell. When cast, the targeted Warrior feels renewed energy surging through their aching muscles.
event.rules: When the scroll is used, pick any Warrior on the Board. That Warrior gets +1 Strength for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Strongmans Mallet
event.flavor: This sizeable wooden mallet is the kind used in carnivals to test one's strength.
event.rules: This magical two-handed mallet causes +1D6 Wounds (or Double Damage if the To Hit roll is a natural 6) and ignores non- Magical Armour. The mallet is deliberately weighted poorly, however, so each time a Warrior attemps to swing it, they must roll 1D6 and add their Strength. If the total is 7 or more, they are able to use it normally. If the total is 6 or less, they suffer -2 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Sunfire Amulet
event.flavor: This amulet radiates warmth and comfort to the wearer.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this amulet gets +2 Starting Wounds. (RPG: In addition, each Turn that there is a Vampire on the same Board Section as the wearer, roll 1D6. If the score is a 4, 5 or 6, the Vampire may not use their special Vampire Ability this Turn.) PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Liberation
event.rules: While holding this sword, the bearer feels light and unencumbered by their belongings. A Warrior wielding this sword gets +2 to any dice rolls when trying to escape spider webs, goblin nets or any other type of physical restraints. In addition, they may ignore any terrain effects or Armour penalties that would reduce their Movement. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Might
event.flavor: This sword is imbued with the strength of an Ogre, and any blow struck with it delivers that power to the target.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this sword they get +1 Strength. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Resilience
event.flavor: This sword throws a mantle of power around its wielder, protecting them from their enemies.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this sword they get +1 Toughness. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Stone
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this weapon feels their skin hardening into a stone-like material, which remains as flexible as normal flesh. While a Warrior is using this sword they get +2 Toughness. PERMANENT

event.name: Swords of Doom Scroll
event.flavor: Instead of wielding one sword, a great many blades suddenly start to whirl and slash the air before the Warrior bearing the scroll.
event.rules: When used, the Warrior bearing the scroll gets +2 Attacks. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Tablet of Anurandel
event.flavor: Anurandel was a Wood Elf Sorceress of Loren, renowned for her peaceful demeanour, sunny disposition and hatred of battle.
event.rules: She fashioned many items to aid her followers should they be assailed by dark forces. The tablet has the power to completely destroy a single item carried by an enemy. Roll 1D6. If the score is a 5 or 6, the item may no longer be used. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Talisman of Alcadizzar
event.flavor: This talisman protected a great Priest King against the decaying magic of the evil Liche Lord Nagash himself. This talisman allows the Warrior to counter Necromantic Magic.
event.rules: Each time a Necromantic spell is cast against the bearer of the amulet, roll 1D6. On a score of 5 or 6 the spell has no effect on them. (RPG: the amulet gives the bearer the Magic Resistance 5+ ability against Necromantic spells). PERMANENT

event.name: Talisman of Ravendark
event.flavor: The gemstone in the center of this talisman glows like a full moon obscured by dark clouds.
event.rules: When the power of this talisman is invoked, all Monsters on the Board with the Fly ability only hit the Warriors on a natural To Hit roll of 6, while any Warrior attacking those Monsters only misses on a natural To Hit roll of 1. The effects of the talisman last for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Talon of Death
event.flavor: This magical artefactsucks all of the light from the surrounding area, creating an aura of darkness.
event.rules: A Warrior bearing the Talon of Death may use it once they have finished moving to cause 1D6 Wounds on every adjacent Monster, with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. Roll for each Monster separately. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Tankard
event.flavor: Although covered in verdigris, this metal tankard is obviously of fine craftsmanship.
event.rules: This is a Dwarf tankard, specially designed for the drinking of Bugman's beer. Tankards like this are much valued by Dwarfs. If a Dwarf finds this tankard, they will never sell it! DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Tapestry
event.flavor: This beautiful tapestry is intricately patterned and most likely hails from a faraway land such as Ind or Cathay.
event.rules: Such tapestries are highly sought after by affluent nobles. It is worth 1D6x50 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Tea Leaves of Nippon
event.flavor: Grown in the rich and fertile fields of the majestic island empire, these tea leaves are highly sought after for their unique flavour.
event.rules: There are 1D6 small bundles of leaves and each is worth 10 gold. (RPG: If sold in a Town, each bundle is worth 20 gold. If sold in a City, each bundle is worth 30 gold.) DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Throwing Knife
event.flavor: This is an extremely well balanced throwing knife that seems to leap from the thrower's hand.
event.rules: A Warrior may throw the knife at any Monster in their Line of Sight that is not in an adjacent square to them. The knife hits on a roll of 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6. It causes 2D6+Strength Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness and Armour. The knife may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. USE ONCE PER COMBAT

event.name: Throwing Ring
event.flavor: This polished bronze ring expands and contracts to fit around its target.
event.rules: This ring may be thrown at any time as a missile weapon with a Range of 3 squares. On a successfully hit, the ring drops over one of the Monster's limbs and constricts. The Monster may not cast spells and suffers -2 To Hit. At the beginning of each subsequent Turn, roll 1D6. If the score is a 6, the ring remains in place and the target suffers the penalties above. On any other score, the Monster manages to free itself. The ring may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Time Freeze Ring
event.rules: When this ring is put on, it freezes like ice and bursts into a cold blue flame, yet still feels comfortable to wear. The Time Freeze Ring may be used at any time, giving the Warriors an additional Warriors' Phase straight away. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Trance Stone
event.flavor: Strands of energy swim serenely throughout this small blue stone.
event.rules: If the bearer does nothing, including move, for one Turn, and there are no Monsters on the Board, they have 1 Wound restored. PERMANENT

event.name: Transportation Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior mumbles a few words and then disappears in a mist of yellow smoke.
event.rules: A Warrior may use this scroll at any time by rolling 1D6. If the result is a 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6, the Warrior may immediately move from the space they are in to any unoccupied space on the Board that has already been explored. If the score is a 1, the Warrior disappears and is never seen again. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Tunic of Brawn
event.flavor: This tunic made from bear and wolf hides has been enchanted by a Norse shaman.
event.rules: While a Warrior is wearing this tunic, they get +1 Stregnth. If the tunic is worn in addition to armour, the wearer suffers -1 Movement and -1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Undead Bane
event.flavor: This sealed silver pot is full of a thick and foul smelling unguent.
event.rules: A weapon coated with this unguent causes +1 Wound (RPG: +1 Wound per Battle-level) to any Undead it hits. There is enough unguent to coat one weapon and the effects last for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Voidmaster Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior temporarily leaves the physical universe for the cold depths of the void, where they can recover their strength.
event.rules: When used, this scroll allows the bearer to disappear from the Board. After one whole Turn, roll 1D6. If the result is a 2, 3, 4,5 or 6, they reappear anywhere on the same Board Section with all of their Wounds restored. If the result is a 1, however, the Warrior disappears in the void and must be removed from the game. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Wall of Steel
event.flavor: This cool blue steel blade flickers as if alive, creating a deadly shimmering blur through which none may pass. In a Corridor or Doorway, no Monster may pass the Warrior while they use this sword, whether they are flying Monsters or even Monsters who are never Pinned.
event.rules: PERMANENT

event.name: Wand of Light
event.flavor: The bright, magical light of this wand radiates an aura of protection.
event.rules: The bearer of the wand can use it to explore just as if they carried the Lantern. In addition, a Warrior carrying this wand gets +1 Toughness. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Warhammer of Eruption
event.flavor: Molten lava spews from this warhammer each time it finds its mark.
event.rules: This two-handed warhammer causes Double Damage to a target if the To Hit roll is a natural 6, and all adjacent models to the target (friend or foe) suffer 1 Wound with no modifiers for anything. However, if the wielder rolls a natural 1 To Hit, they are splashed with magma and suffer 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. PERMANENT

event.name: Warlock Slayer Helm
event.flavor: This card appears on the dungeon treasure table, but the scan did not preserve its description text clearly enough to recover it reliably.
event.rules: The full rules text could not be recovered from the source scan.

event.name: Weaponmaster Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior calls on the powers of the scroll to guide their hand as they move to strike down their enemies.
event.rules: When used, the Warrior bearing the scroll gets +2 Weapon Skill for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Whirlwind Staff
event.flavor: The Wizard-warrior Oscurus the Intrepid carried this staff into the darkest dungeons of the Old World.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this staff, they get +1 Attack. Each time the wielder rolls a natural 6 To Hit with the staff the target is flung into the air, and crashes down into an unoccupied square (determined at random) on the same Board Section. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: White Wolf Cowl
event.flavor: This cowl has been imbued with a mysterious energy during the rituals of a Norse shaman.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this cowl gets +1 Toughness (RPG: or +2 Toughness against any cold-based attacks). This cowl cannot be worn at the same time as a helmet. PERMANENT

event.name: Window of the Void Scroll
event.flavor: The scroll creates a dark portal that hypnotically attracts Monsters. The portal is created in any empty square within the bearer's Line of Sight. Roll 1D6 for each Monster adjacent to the portal. On a score of 1, 2, 3 or 4 that Monster stands its ground and may ignore the portal. On a roll of 5 or 6 the Monster is hypnotically attracted to the portal, steps through it and vanishes.
event.rules: Once you have rolled for each adjacent Monster, the portal closes with a loud crack. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Wines of Bretonnia
event.flavor: The kingdom of Bretonnia is a lordly realm of knights and castles, barons and chivalry.
event.rules: The Bretonnians are second only to the Elves of Ulthuan when it comes to the creation of fine wines, and their best vintages fetch a high price throughout the world. There are 1D6 unopened bottles of 100-year old wine, a spectacular find indeed! Each bottle is worth 100 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Wings of Power Scroll
event.flavor: Leathery wings sprout from the Warrior's back, lifting them into the air.
event.rules: This scroll allows the Warrior bearing it to fly for one Turn. While airborne the Warrior may not make any attacks, and may not be attacked in hand-to-hand Combat. While in the air a Warrior moves normally and may ignore any ground-based obstacles such as chasms or pits. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Wizard's Staff
event.flavor: This ornate staff radiates with power.
event.rules: If the Wizard wields the staff like a weapon, he gets +1 Toughness but suffers -1 To Hit. The Wizard may use the staff to re-roll the Power Phase roll once Per Adventure. The Wizard's Staff contains 1 point of Power, which the Wizard can use in the same way as his Power Tokens. (RPG: The Wizard may recharge the staff by visiting the Font of Power.) PERMANENT USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Wood Carving of Kislev
event.flavor: The Kingdom of Kislev is famous for its history of horse warriors.
event.rules: This masterfully wood-carved horse statue, decorated with tiny gemstones, hails from the war-driven nation of Kislev, and is worth 1D6x25 gold. DISCARD AFTER SALE

event.name: Wood Elf Warpaint
event.flavor: This magic paint is imbued with the power of Orion, giving an Elf even more agility and nimbleness during battle.
event.rules: If an Elf smears this paint on their arms and face, any Monsters attacking them suffer -1 To Hit in hand-to-hand Combat and -2 To Hit with a missile weapon. Once applied, the paint lasts for one Combat. There is enough paint for 1D3 applications. Each unused application is worth 100 gold. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Wyvern Staff
event.flavor: This staff was made from the bones of a wyvern and the essence of the creature is said to still reside within.
event.rules: A Warrior who wields this two-handed weapon gets +2 Toughness and causes +1 Wound but suffers -1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Zhen's Left Gauntlet
event.flavor: Zhen was a warrior from Cathay who played a significant role in expelling the Hobgoblin invaders.. The first Attack each Turn made against the wearer of this gauntlet suffers -1 To Hit. For one Turn per Adventure all Attacks against the wearer only hit on a natural 5 or 6 To Hit.
event.rules: If a Warrior wears both gauntlets, the first attacks suffers -2 To Hit and for one Turn per Adventure all Attacks made against them only hit on a natural 6. PERMANENT USE ONE TURN PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Zhen's Right Gauntlet
event.flavor: Zhen was a warrior from Cathay who played a significant role in expelling the Hobgoblin invaders... The first Attack each Turn made against the wearer of this gauntlet suffers -1 To Hit. For one Turn per Adventure all Attacks against the wearer only hit on a natural 5 or 6 To Hit.
event.rules: If a Warrior wears both gauntlets, the first attacks suffers -2 To Hit and for one Turn per Adventure all Attacks made against them only hit on a natural 6. PERMANENT USE ONE TURN PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Amulet of Protection
event.flavor: This amulet glows with a reddish light and has the power to transmute the energy of its wearer.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this amulet gets +2 Toughness and may ignore any spell cast against them on a D6 roll of 6 (RPG: they get +1 Willpower and the Magic Resistance 6+ ability). To achieve this, the amulet saps the wearer's strength and agility. While wearing the amulet the Warrior suffers -1 Strength, -1 To Hit and -2 Initiative. Once donned, this amulet cannot be removed. PERMANENT

event.name: Amulet of Resistance
event.flavor: The soft, magical glow from this amulet betrays the fact that it is anything but ordinary. This amulet is worth 500 gold.
event.rules: If used by a Witch Hunter, the amulet has 1D6 charges and each charge confers the Magic Resistance ability for one Turn. When the amulet is activated roll 1D6 for each spell cast against the bearer. On a score of 4, 5 or 6, the spell has no effect. (RPG: The amulet can be recharged (or ruined) at the Witch Hunters' Guild like other amulets the Witch Hunter has, but it will never be one that appears on the altar.) LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Aphreeta's Box of Tricks
event.flavor: This strange ornate box has no apparent lid.
event.rules: A Warrior may attempt to open this box during Combat by rolling 1D6. If the score is a 1, the box explodes and the Warrior suffers 3D6 Wounds. If the score is a 2 or 3, the box does not open but the Warrior may try again next Turn. If the score is a 4, 5 or 6, the box opens and beams of light shoot out toward the Warrior's foes. Every Monster in the Warrior's Line of Sight suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. Roll for each Monster separately. At the beginning of the next Adventure, the box mysteriously closes and can be used again. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE LASTS UNTIL EXPLODES

event.name: Armour of Dargan
event.flavor: The glow from this deep red armour lights up the area.
event.rules: This armour makes the wearer harder to hit: they get +4 Toughness and any Monster attacking them suffers -1 To Hit unless using a Magic Weapon. PERMANENT

event.name: Armour of Meteoric Iron
event.flavor: This armour looks pitted and dull, but it glows with a dim radiance that betrays its true nature.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this armour gets +3 Toughness. However, once worn it fuses to the Warrior's flesh and cannot be removed. Unfortunately, given its weight, it cannot be carried. It must be donned immediately or left where it is found. PERMANENT

event.name: Armour of Taakan
event.flavor: This matt black suit of full armour has dull bronze battle runes engraved on the breastplate, arms and helm. It is said to be endowed with a life of its own, striking at the enemy no matter what its wearer intends.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this suit gets the benefits of Heavy Armour and a Warhelm (+5 Toughness, -1 Movement). Every time an enemy wounds the Warrior the armour retaliates and forces its wearer to strike back. Make a single Attack against the enemy that just hit them. Note that, if successful, this attack does not cause a Death-blow. PERMANENT

event.name: Armour of Turiss
event.flavor: Turiss was a fearsome Warrior who had this armour enchanted to protect him against Necromantic Magic.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this armour gets +2 Toughness. In addition, roll 1D6 any time a Necromantic spell is cast against the wearer. If the score is a 4, 5 or 6, the spell has no effect. If the score is a 1, however, the armour is destroyed and must be discarded. LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Arrows of Loren
event.flavor: These arrows were cut from the greatest trees in the forest of Loren and carefully crafted so that their flight is the truest of all.
event.rules: A Warrior using these arrows gets +2 To Hit. In addition, they ignore 1 point of Armour and cause +1 Wound. There are 3D6 arrows and each arrow may only be used once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Axe of Blood
event.flavor: This axe can overpower even the most steadfast Warrior.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this axe gets +1 Attack and +1 Strength. If Monsters are on the Board at the start of the Warriors' Phase, roll 1D6 to see how the Warrior reacts this Turn: 1 Insane! They attack the nearest Warrior, ignoring Pinning, and suffer -1 To Hit. Roll again next Turn. 2-5 Fury! They attack the nearest Monster but suffer -1 To Hit. Roll again next Turn adding +1 to the roll. 6 Control! The Warrior may fight as normal and need not roll again this Combat. PERMANENT

event.name: Axe of Khemri
event.flavor: This magical axe was forged many centuries ago by the Priest Kings of the ancient realm of Khemnri. It is a mighty weapon with a pure white blade. When their kingdom fell, the axe was lost, presumed destroyed.
event.rules: When using this Axe, the wilder may roll an extra dice for Damage and discard the lowest score. They then add their Strength to the score as normal. In addition, when used against Undead, the wielder gets +1 To Hit. (RPG: The abilities of this axe cannot be added to in any way, such as runes etc.) PERMANENT

event.name: Axe of Slaying
event.flavor: This axe was once wielded by the Dwarf Giant Slayer Umgrul
event.rules: Grunnson at the final battle of Karak Azgal. For one Attack this axe automatically hits its target. Roll1D6 to determine the axe's Damage. If the score is a 1, the axe causes 1D6+Strength Wounds. If the score is a 2, the axe causes 2D6+Strength Wounds, and so on. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Bands of the Immortal
event.rules: Upon donning these bracelets the Warrior feels a surge of tremendous power coursing through their veins. While a Warrior wears these bands, they get +1 Strength and +1 Toughness. In addition, once per Adventure one of the Warrior's regular Attacks causes Double Damage. The bands cannot be worn with any armour that gives the wearer more than +2 Toughness (RPG: until the wearer is Battel-level 4 or higher). PERMANENT

event.name: Bane Sword
event.flavor: As soon as it is drawn in the presence of its hated foe this blade snarls and growls, eager to spill blood.
event.rules: Draw an Event Card until it reveals Monsters to determine what sort of Monsters the sword hates. (RPG: Roll on the Monster Table that is the same level as the Warrior's Battle-level). The sword causes Double Damage against all Monsters of that race. df you roll Skaven Assassins, for instance, the Bane Sword affects all Skaven.) PERMANENT

event.name: Battle Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Battle Stone of the Marquis. Any one of the Warrior's Attacks (but not a Death-blow) automatically hits the target. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Belt of Gagron
event.flavor: This thick leather belt belonged to the Dwarf Gagron the Giantslayer who lived to a surprisingly ripe old age.
event.rules: Each time the wearer of this belt is reduced to zero Wounds, roll 1D6 at the end of the Turn (as long as the Warrior has received no other form of healing during the Turn). On a score of 3, 4 or 5 the belt restores 1D6 Wounds. On a score of 6 the belt restores 2D6 Wounds. Once donned, the Belt of Gagron cannot be removed. PERMANENT

event.name: Blade of Leaping Bronze
event.flavor: Ass soon as it is drawn this blade strikes with incredible speed.
event.rules: While wielding this sword a Warrior gets +2 Attacks. PERMANENT

event.name: Blade of Leaping Gold
event.flavor: This blade Is superbly balanced and moves in a swift golden arc with almost no effort on the wielder's part, slicing through the enemy ranks with ease.
event.rules: While wielding this sword a Warrior gets +3 Attacks. PERMANENT

event.name: Blazeshot Pistol
event.flavor: This pistol delivers a burning blast of shot can perforate even the most durable armour. This pistol is a missile weapon with Strength 6 and a Range of 6. It takes one Turn to reload after it has been fired.
event.rules: Any shot fire from this pistol becomes so hot that it ignores all non-masgical Armour. There is enough gunpowder and shot to last one Adventure. PERMANENT

event.name: Blood Ring
event.flavor: A lustrous blood-red stone is mounted in the center of this ring.
event.rules: Each time the wearer of this ring suffers Wounds, the ring absorbs one of the Wounds instead of the wearer. The ring can store a total number of Wounds equal to the wearer's Starting Wounds score. If there are no Monsters on the Board, the wearer can use as many of the stored Wounds as they would like to heal themselves. Once the ring is put on, it may not be removed. PERMANENT

event.name: Blood Sword
event.flavor: This ominous-looking longsword perpetually drips blood onto the floor. After any other attacks the Warrior using this sword makes each Turn, roll 1D6 for each model (Warriors as well as Monsters) in a square adjacent to them.
event.rules: On a score of 6, the sword lashes out and strikes the target of its own volition, causing Damage as normal. PERMANENT

event.name: Book of Arcane Knowledge
event.flavor: The pages of this aged book rustle with a life of their own. This book contains spells that a Wizard may cast. Take any Spell Cards not currently in play to represent the spells contained within the book. (RPG: Roll 4D6. These dice are used to buy spells for the book in the same way the Wizard gains spells when he goes up a Battle-level.)
event.rules: Each spell may be cast once automatically at no Power cost. Once a spell has been cast that page of the book crumbles to dust. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Book of Metamorphosis
event.flavor: This ancient book whispers the name of the Warrior who holds it in their hands.
event.rules: A Warrior whose eyes fall upon the pages of this tome may improve either their Attack, Strength, Toughness, Weapon Skill, Ballistic Skill, Initiative, or Escape Pinning (RPG: or Luck or Willpower) Characteristic by 1, or they may add 1D6 to their Starting Wounds. This increase is permanent. A Warrior may only read a Book of Metamorphosis once in their lifetime. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Boots of Flight
event.flavor: These elegant boots float an inch or so off the ground, their outline shimmering with magical energy.
event.rules: While wearing these boots a Warrior may levitate a few inches above the ground while moving. While airborne the Warrior may pass over chasms, pits, etc. unhindered and anyone who attacks them suffers -1 To Hit. The boots last for one Adventure, after which they lose their magic and must be discarded. LASTS FOR ONE ADVENTURE

event.name: Bow of Loren
event.flavor: This slender bow was fashioned by the Wood Elves of Loren.
event.rules: This bow is Strength 4. (RPG: It causes 1D6 Wounds per Battle- level of the wielder). If the Damage is sufficient to kill the target outright, and there is a Monster directly behind it in the direction the bow was fired, the arrow continues. Roll To Hit that Monster too. This process continues until there are no Monsters in the direct line of fire, or one of them survives, or the arrow misses. PERMANENT

event.name: Bracelet of Saphery
event.flavor: This slender, glittering bracelet is said to come from Saphery, created by the Elven Mages who dwelt there in ages past.
event.rules: When the Warrior finds the bracelet, randomly select one of the Wizard's Starting Spell Cards. This spell is stored in the bracelet, and may be cast once automatically during the Adventure. (RPG: Before each Adventure randomly select one spell with a Casting Number that is equivalent to the Warrior's Battle-level. This spell may be cast automatically.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Brooch of Power
event.flavor: This brooch glows too brightly to look at, as if it contained the energy of a fallen star.
event.rules: At the end of each Turn, the Wizard may store any unused Power that he has left over within the brooch. This stored Power may then be used at any time to in the same manner as the Wizard's Power Tokens. The brooch can hold a maximum of 6 Power (APG: 6 + Battle-level) at any one time. In addition, the bright aura cast by the brooch distracts any Monsters attacking the Wizard, so they suffer -1 To Hit him. PERMANENT

event.name: Century Bow
event.flavor: Every hundred years this bow is passed on to an Elf who performs a great deed.
event.rules: This Bow is Strength 3 and causes +1 Wound (RPG: +1 Wound per Battle-level). PERMANENT

event.name: Chalice of Battle
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks from this black chalice finds their head filled with visions of war and conflict. A Warrior who drinks from the chalice gets +1 Attack, +1 To Hit and their attacks cause +1D6 Wounds for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Chalice of Sorcery
event.flavor: This dull metal chalice seems wholely unremarkable. Rubbing away the grime of years reveals it to be a Chalice of Sorcery.
event.rules: This chalice acts as a source of Power that allows the Wizard to carry on casting spells when his own Power has run out. The Wizard can try to draw as many points of Power out of the chalice as he likes. For every point of Power he draws, roll 1D6. All the extra Power must be drawn at once so all the dice are rolled at the same time. For each dice that scores a 1 the Wizard suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Chandra's Mirror
event.flavor: Lady Chandra de Celeone gave this mirror to the Bretonnian Knight Marius Rand who used it to defeat the Gorgon Thusela in her Black Mountains Lair.
event.rules: Each time a Monster casts a spell on the Warrior holding this mirror roll 1D6. On a score of 6 the spell is rebounded back onto the caster. (RPG: In addition, any time a Monster with the Petrify ability rolls a natural 1 To Hit the bearer, roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 the Monster's gaze is reflected back on itself and it suffers the full effects of its own gaze attack. If the Monster's Movement ever reaches zero due to this mirror, it turns to stone and is killed.) PERMANENT

event.name: Citadel Helm
event.flavor: A champion wore this helm to defend Estalia during an invasion from Araby.
event.rules: The wearer of this helm gets +3 Toughness during the first round of each Combat, +2 Toughness during the second round of each Combat and +1 Toughness at all other times. PERMANENT

event.name: Cleats of Cutback
event.flavor: These cleats have been enchanted by a Wizard from the Colleges of Magic in Altdorf.
event.rules: When worn by an Ex-Blood Bowl Player, these cleats allow him to change direction once when performing a Running Blitz Attack. They can only be sold at a Foote Locker in a Blood Bowl Stadium. PERMANENT

event.name: Cloak of Darkness
