event.flavor: This dark cloak exudes trails of black smoke, making the wearer undetectable in a dark dungeon.
event.rules: A Warrior may conceal themselves with this cloak at the star of the Warriors' Phase. They cannot be attacked, but can do nothing else for the rest of the Turn. At the start of the next Turn, the wearer may make a special Ambush Attack against one adjacent Monster. They get +1 To Hit and cause Double Damage. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Cloak of Invulnerability
event.rules: When a Warrior puts this cloak on, a hazy sheen of magical protective power descends upon them. The first time that the wearer of this cloak is hit each Turn, roll 1D6. If the result is a 6, the Warrior is protected by the power of the cloak and the attack, whatever its origin, has no effect. When wearing this cloak, a Warrior cannot wear armour but they may wear a helmet and carry a shield. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Courage Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Courage Stone of the Marquis. It is worth 500 gold. (RPG: A Warrior using the Courage Stone may automatically pass one Fear or Terror test.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Criscorra's Crossbow
event.flavor: Criscora, a sorceress from Stirland, created this crossbow to defend her residence from a legion of Undead.
event.rules: Over 100 ghastly creatures fell before she was finally overrun. This Repeating Crossbow is Strength 3, a Range of 8 and can fire up to 2 shots per Turn. It uses no quarrels, firing magical bolts of energy instead. In addition, the first bolt fired in each Turn causes extra Wounds equal to the Power Phase roll ona successful hit. If the Power Phase roll is a 1, the crossbow cannot be fired that Turn. PERMANENT

event.name: Crown of Sorcery
event.flavor: As soon as they put this crown on, the wearer is plunged into the alien and dark world of magical power familiar to wizards. The wearer takes two Starting Spell Cards of each type at random: these are the spells they may cast just like the Wizard. They may now also use Wizard-only treasure and can still wear Armour.
event.rules: Each Turn the Warrior gets to cast one or more of their spells just like the Wizard. Each time they cast one of their spells roll1D6. If the score is a 1 that spell fails and the Warrior is immobilised. They can do nothing for the rest of the Turn and any Attacks made against them hit on anything buta 1. PERMANENT

event.name: Crown of Thoughts
event.flavor: This battered crown is a powerful magic artefact.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this crown can detect hostile vibrations in the atmosphere, and is seldom surprised. When Monsters appear who would normally Ambush the Warriors, the wearer should roll 1D6: 1-3. Ambushed as normal. 4-5 The Warrior parries any blows made against them. The Monsters' Ambush Attacks have no effect. 6 As 4-5, and the Warrior gets an extra Attack before the Monsters strike, in addition to any others they may have that Turn. All the other Warriors are ambushed as usual. PERMANENT

event.name: Dawnstone
event.flavor: This crystal-like stone is mounted in a black iron brooch and radiates a pale light like that of the early morning.
event.rules: The Dawnstone may be used to restore any one Warrior to full Wounds immediately, even if they are on zero Wounds or died several Turns ago. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Deck of Destiny
event.flavor: Neatly wrapped inside a piece of cloth is a deck of mysterious cards.
event.rules: This rare deck will fetch 600 gold from the right collector. (RPG: A Warrior may draw one of these cards just before travelling to a Settlement by rolling 1D6. If the score is a 1, the card symbolises misfortune and they must deduct 1 from all rolls made for Travelling Hazards and Settlement Events. If the score is 2, 3, 4 or 5 the card represents protection and they may add +1 to all rolls for Travelling Hazards. If the score is a 6, as per 2-5 above, but the Warrior may also add +1 to all rolls made for Settlement Events.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Dragon Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Dragon Stone of the Marquis. A Warrior using the Dragon Stone gets +1D6 Toughness for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Dragon Sword
event.flavor: This blade is fashioned from the venom fang of a Great Fire Dragon and is ancient beyond ail telling. This sword causes Double Damage on a natural To Hit roll of 5 or 6. However, the sword is partially sentient and refuses to be drawn from its scabbard by unworthy Warriors. At the start of each Turn the wielder wants to use the sword, roll 1D6.
event.rules: On a roll of 1, 2 or 3 the sword refuses to leave its scabbard. (RPG: It will not let itself be used by Warriors of Battle-level 3 or below.) PERMANENT

event.name: Elf Bow
event.flavor: This fine weapon is exquisitely carved and possesses a strength far above that of any other bow.
event.rules: While using this bow a Warrior may make as many shots per Turn as they have Attacks, at their full Strength. PERMANENT

event.name: Elf Helm
event.flavor: A fine Elf helm. Light but surprisingly strong.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this helm gets +1 Toughness. When hit, the wearer may elect to take the blow on the head by rolling 1D6: 1 The Elf Helm absorbs all the Damage from the blow, but is destroyed in the process. 2-4 Resolve the blow as normal. 5-6 The blow glances off, causing no Damage. LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Elf Shield
event.flavor: This finely crafted shield glitters with an unearthly sheen.
event.rules: A Warrior using the Elf Shield gets +1 Toughness. In addition, the bearer can ignore the Damage from the first blow they take each Turn unless the attacker's To Hit roll was a natural 6. PERMANENT

event.name: Elven Armour
event.flavor: This amour looks extremely delicate but is amongst the most effective protection in the known world.
event.rules: While wearing this armour, a Warrior gets +1 Toughness. In addition, if any of the attacker's Damage Dice score an unmodified 1 or 2, ignore these dice when resolving the Damage. PERMANENT

event.name: Enchanted Great Shield
event.flavor: The surface of this shield gleams as brightly as a mirror. Clouds roll across its surface, and shards of light cut the air around it.
event.rules: A Warrior using this shield gets +3 Toughness but may not use any other Armour, except for a helmet (RPG: until the wearer is Battle-level 4 or above). PERMANENT

event.name: Enchanted Jade Amulet
event.flavor: This amulet resembles a stone worn smooth by the action of the sea.
event.rules: This amulet has the power to heal wounds Each time the wearer uses the amulet roll 1D6: 1 The amulet crumbles to dust and the Warrior suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. 2 The amulet has no effect. 3-6 The Warrior has 1 Wound (RPG: 1 Wound per Battle- level) restored. The amulet fails to work while the Warrior wearing it is on zero Wounds. USE ONCE PER TURN LASTS UNTIL DESTROYED

event.name: Fireball Wand
event.flavor: The gems set into the crown of this wand glow with a flickering light.
event.rules: Pick a 2 square by 2 square area of the Board Section within the Warrior's Line of Sight. Each Monster in that area suffers 1D6+3 Wounds. When found, the wand has a single charge. (RPG: At the start of each Adventure, the wand will have 1D3 charges. Charges not used by the end of the Adventure are lost.) 1D3 CHARGES PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Firestorm Icon
event.flavor: This shard of crystal has a raging fire burning at its core, which flares up to a blazing wall of fire at the wielder's command. Pick a 2 square by 2 square area within the Warrior's Line of Sight. All Monsters in the targeted area suffer 6D6 Wounds Croll once for all the Monsters), with no modifiers for anything.
event.rules: USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Flail of Decimation
event.flavor: Brynjar Thundmoor was a Norse warrior renowned for his ability with this flail. It is said that the enchantment in it evolved from his constant battles against wicked foes.
event.rules: While wielding this flail, a Warrior gets +2 Strength, +1 To Hit and causes +1D6 Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Frostblade
event.flavor: This pale metallic blue weapon exudes a freezing aura and its blade glitters like ice.
event.rules: When wielding the Frostblade the Warrior may only make 1 Attack per Turn. If the Warrior makes a successful Attack with the Frostblade that causes at least 1 point of Damage (after all deductions and Special Abilities), the target is automatically slain. A blow from a Frostblade cannot cause a Death-blow. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Gauntlets of Soul Rending
event.flavor: These cold steel gauntlets have been steeped in powerful magic, and are able to tear the life essence from their victim.
event.rules: With these gauntlets, a Warrior may make an extra Attack every Turn, which must be made before the Warrior makes any other Attacks. The Attack with the Gauntlets suffers -1 To Hit and causes normal Damage. (RPG: The first time that the Warrior kills a Monster with these gauntlets in every Adventure, roll 1D6. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 they add +1 Wound to their Starting Wounds score permanently.) PERMANENT

event.name: Gems of Life
event.flavor: These small gems sparkle with a strange, otherworldly energy. This pair of gems is worth 700 gold. (RPG: One of these gems should be worn while the other is kept in a safe place away from the Dungeon. If the wearer is killed, shortly after their death their body starts to dwindle in size until it is a pinprick of light contained with the gem. The only things left behind are mundane items such as bandages, the Lantern or a rope.
event.rules: If the other Warriors survive the rest of the Dungeon and bring the two gems back together, their magical power recalls the dead Warrior, alive and well, just as they were before the Adventure started.) USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Glacier Axe
event.flavor: A magical, freezing sheet of ice envelops a portion of this axe.
event.rules: Each time a Warrior wounds a target with this axe, roll 1D6. If the score is equal to or greater than the target's Toughness, it suffers an additional 1D3 Wounds and is encased in a sarcophagus of ice and may not move or fight. While entombed, the target cannot be attacked. Roll 1D6 at the beginning of the next Monsters' Phase. If the score is greater than the target's Toughness, the target suffers another 1D3 Wounds and remains encased. If the score is less than the target's Toughness, then the ice melts and the target is free. PERMANENT

event.name: Gladiator Belt
event.flavor: A metal skull acts as the clasp for this studded belt.
event.rules: While wearing this belt a Warrior gets +1 Strength. If worn by a Pit Fighter, he also gets +1 Attack. PERMANENT

event.name: Gold Sigil Sword
event.flavor: Golden runes gleam on this blade, granting the wielder the first chance to strike.
event.rules: While wielding this sword, a Warrior will always go first in the Warriors' Phase unless another rule specifies otherwise. In addition, the wielder may add +2 to their roll to Escape from Pinning. PERMANENT

event.name: Gravesword
event.flavor: This sword feels as light as wood but is more powerful than regular steel.
event.rules: While a Warrior is using this word they get +1 To Hit against any Undead creature. In addition, once per Adventure it causes +3D6 Wounds to one Undead creature. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Greater Antidote
event.flavor: The liquid in this bottle is thin like water and has a floral aroma.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this potion has 1D6 Wounds restored. (RPG: In addition, a Warrior who drink this antidote will restore all the points to their Characteristics that had previously been reduced for any reason. This potion cannot restore Wounds that have been permanently reduced.) USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Gromril Blade
event.flavor: This mighty axe is a Dwarf artefact, able to cut through all but the most powerful armour.
event.rules: This two-handed axe ignores non-Magical Armour and causes Double Damage. However, the axe is partially sentient and refuses to be drawn by unworthy Warriors. At the start of each Turn that the bearer wishes to use it, roll 1D6. On a roll of 1 or 2 the axe cannot be drawn. (APG: It will not let itself be used by Warriors of Battle-level 2 or below.) PERMANENT

event.name: Halberd of Defiance
event.flavor: This halberd was created by the High Elves of Ulthuan to defend against the constant raids from Naggaroth.
event.rules: When wielding this two-handed weapon in Combat a Warrior gets +1 Strength, +3 Toughness and may attack from up to 2 squares away in hand-to-hand Combat. PERMANENT

event.name: Halberd of Hatred
event.flavor: An aura of deep hatred surrounds this wicked halberd.
event.rules: A Warrior using this two-handed weapon gets +2 Strength and may attack from up to 2 squares away in hand-to-hand Combat. If used against Orcs, the wielder gets double their regular Attacks but is so full of rage that they suffer -1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Hammer of Shattering
event.flavor: A magical rune of an anvil has been emblazoned upon this hammer.
event.rules: The Hammer ignores non-magical Armour. In addition, if the To Hit roll is a 6, the target's Armour is destroyed! If the target's Armour is magical, however, roll another 1D6. On a 6 the magical Armour is destroyed. PERMANENT

event.name: Hammer of Sigmar
event.flavor: This weapon was given to the legendary hero Sigmar by King
event.rules: Kurgan Ironbeard, to cement an alliance between Dwarfs and Men. It is perhaps the most ancient and revered of all the magic weapons in the Empire. The Hammer of Sigmar ignores all except Magical Armour when rolling for Damage. In addition, if the To Hit roll was a natural 6, it causes Quadruple Damage. There can only ever be one Hammer of Sigmar in the party. PERMANENT

event.name: Hammer of Spite
event.flavor: This Hammer seeks certain Monsters, to be slain at all costs.
event.rules: Choose a Monster as it is placed on the Board as the hammer's hated foe. If there is an empty space adjacent to that Monster, the wielder of the hammer may be placed in that space, no matter how far away or what Monsters intervene. The Warrior gets an immediate Ambush Attack against that Monster, and gains +1 Attack every Turn against that Monster until it is dead. If the wielder kills the Monster, they gain double its Gold Value. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Hell Bird
event.flavor: This two-handed weapon has been suffused with the skin shed by a Coatl, a mystical creature from the land of Lustria.
event.rules: While wielding the Hell Bird, in addition to their regular Attacks, a Warrior may leap into the air to make an extra Death Chop Attack into an adjacent square. Roll To Hit as normal. If the Attack hits, then the model in that square, as well as any model in the square directly behind it suffers Damage as normal Croll separately for each modelO> The Death Chop may not cause a Death-blow. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Hellfire Sword
event.flavor: Flames leap and burn along the length of this other-worldly sword. As it swings through the air it leaves a trail of spitting magma in its wake.
event.rules: If the wielder hits their opponent with a natural To Hit roll of 6, as well as causing normal Damage the target and all adjacent models to the target (including the wielder!) burst into flames and take an extra 1D6+1 (RPG: 1D6 + Battle-level) Wounds, with no modifiers for Toughness or Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Helm of Alcadizzar
event.flavor: This glittering helmet was worn by Alcadizzar as he rode into battle against the Undead hordes.
event.rules: It is said that the helm had the magic ability to store the light of the sun, and the Undead would flee in terror from the blazing figure of Alcadizzar as he galloped across the battlefield. This helm illuminates the area allowing the wearer to explore just as if they carried the Lantern. In addition, they get +1 Toughness, and any Undead attacking them suffer -1 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Helm of Blitzing
event.flavor: The wings fashioned on this helm have been deliberately sharpened.
event.rules: While wearing this helmet a Warrior gets +1 Toughness. In addition, if worn by an Ex-Blood Bowl Player, he causes an extra +1D3 Wounds on each successful hit during a Running Blitz Attack. PERMANENT

event.name: Helm of Farseeing
event.flavor: This black helm has no apparent visor, yet it imparts upon the wearer the ability to see clearly even in the dim light of a dungeon.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears this helm gets +1 Toughness. In addition, this helmet allows the wearer to see in the dark and explore just as if they carried the Lantern. PERMANENT

event.name: Helm of Possession
event.flavor: From within the depths of this ugly helm, the Warrior's eyes stare out with an otherworldly intensity.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this helm gets +1 Toughness. In addition, once per Turn, the Warrior wearing the helm may attempt to hypnotise any one Monster that is within their Line of Sight. Roll 1D6. On a score of 6, the Monster is hypnotised for one Turn. Whilst hypnotised, the Monster loses 1D6 Attacks. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Hero Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Hero Stone of the Marquis. A Warrior using the Hero Stone gets +1D3 Attacks for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Holy Stake & Hammer
event.flavor: These wooden tools were cut from the branches of a sacred tree, hardened in a holy flame and blessed by a priest of Sigmar.
event.rules: Once per Adventure, a Warrior adjacent to a Vampire in Combat may attempt to use the stake to slay the creature. Roll 1D6. If the score is a natural 6, the Warrior manages to strike the creature directly in the heart and it dies immediately. This roll cannot be affected by Luck, Faith or any other means. DISCARD AFTER SUCCESSFUL USE (From 'Vampire Slayers' Adventure)

event.name: Horn of Defiance
event.flavor: This bronze horn shines as if it was recently polished.
event.rules: When blown, the magical power of this horn allows all the Warriors to parry incoming blows. When a Warrior is attacked in hand-to-hand Combat, roll 1D6. On a score of 6 they turn the blow and it causes no Damage (RPG: They gain the Parry 6+ ability). The effect lasts until the Combat ends, or a 1 is rolled in the Power Phase. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Horn of Vengeance
event.flavor: As this horn is blown a howling wind tosses the Monsters to the ground.
event.rules: When a Warrior blows this horn. roll 1D6 for every Monster on the same Board Section. If the score is more than the Monster's Toughness, it is hurled to the ground and suffers 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for Armour. It will take a Monster a whole Turn to get up. During this time it may do nothing else. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Hydra Sword
event.flavor: Steeped in the blood of a hydra as it was forged, this blade has taken on some of the properties of these terrible beasts.
event.rules: For one Attack, this blade causes +6D6 Wounds. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Lantern of Revelation
event.flavor: This lantern is more than a light source...
event.rules: When activated, this magical lantern can be used just like the leader's Lantern. In addition, the bearer can never be ambushed by Monsters. At the end of each Combat, the bearer may roll 1D6. On a score of 6, they receive an extra Dungeon Room Treasure which does not count toward their share. (RPG: The bearer may also add +1 to any rolls to find secret doors). The lantern draws power from whoever carries it. If the Power Phase roll is a 1, the bearer must roll 1D6. If the result is a 1 or 2, the bearer must subtract 1 from their Starting Wounds score permanently. The lantern cannot be turned off until the bearer exits the Dungeon. PERMANENT

event.name: Left Gauntlet of Damzhar
event.flavor: This thick iron gauntlet is covered with studs in the shape of Dwarf runes.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears the Left Gauntlet of Damzhar gets +1 Strength, as well as +1 Attack with the weapon they hold in the gauntlet. If a Warrior wears both Gauntlets of Damzhar, they get a total of +2 Strength and +1 Attack for each weapon they wield (or +2 Attacks if holding a two-handed weapon). In addition, once per Adventure, they gain a special Gauntlet Attack that gets +1 To Hit and causes 4D6 Damage (do not add Strength to the score). PERMANENT

event.name: Life Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt Cone finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Life Stone of the Marquis. The bearer can use this magical stone at any time to ignore the Damage from a single blow that would otherwise kill them. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Lifestone of Ashraaz
event.flavor: Ashraaz was one of the insane sorcerers of Araby. Fables tell that he created mystical stones which sucked the essence of life from the air itself.
event.rules: Each Turn the bearer may use the Lifestone to restore 1D3 Wounds, so long as the Warrior is on 1 or more Wounds when they choose to use it. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Lightning Spear
event.flavor: Bolts of energy streak up and down the blade of this two- handed spear.
event.rules: A Warrior may throw this spear as a missile weapon (Range 4, may be retrieved at the end of Combat) or may use it to attack from up to 2 squares away in hand-to-hand Combat. If the To Hit roll is a 6, then the target suffers an additional 2D6 Lightning Damage (no modifiers for Armour). Roll another 1D6. If the score is a 5 or 6, the bolt arcs to the next nearest Monster and hits it for 2D6 Wounds (no modifiers for Armour). This process continues until the bolt fails to arc. A Monster may not be hit a subsequent time. PERMANENT

event.name: Mending Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Wizard from
event.rules: Bretonnian. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Mending Stone of the Marquis. A Warrior using the Mending Stone is restored to full Wounds. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Mirror of Imprisonment
event.flavor: Carvings of tormented souls line the frame of this mirror.
event.rules: Once per Combat a Warrior may show this mirror to an adjacent Monster by rolling 1D6. If the score is equal to or greater than the Monster's Toughness, it becomes trapped inside the mirror and is removed from the Board. At the start of each Turn thereafter, roll 1D6. If the score is a 1 or 2, the Monster escapes and is placed next to the Warrior with the mirror (moving models as necessary). It receives an immediate attack against the Warrior, and then attacks as normal in the Monsters' Phase. The bearer can shatter the mirror at any time whereupon any Monster inside is killed. The Warriors do not receive any gold for a Monster killed in this manner. USE ONCE PER COMBAT LASTS UNTIL SHATTERED

event.name: Net of Curtailment
event.flavor: This magic-imbued and restrain even the strongest creatures!
event.rules: A Warrior may throw this net at a single Monster up to 2 squares away by rolling 1D6 (a Pit Fighter may add +1 to the roll). If the score is a 4, 5 or 6, the target is netted for the rest of the Combat and suffers -1 To Hit. Any Warrior attacking a netted Monster gets +1 To Hit it. The net may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. PERMANENT

event.name: Orb of Divination
event.flavor: Strange images flash inside this crystal and the Warriors swear that they caught a glimpse of themselves.
event.rules: A Warrior can use this orb to see what is beyond each Doorway on the current Board Section. This includes drawing Dungeon or Event Cards and rolling on any tables or sub-tables as a result. If the Warriors choose to enter those new Board Sections, they must roll 1D6. If the score is a 1, the orb was wrong and the Warriors must interact with the Board Section anew. If the score is 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6, then the orb was accurate and they must play it as it was foretold. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Pistol & Shot
event.flavor: Nestled within an engraved wooden box, this pistol looks as expensive as it does deadly.
event.rules: The pistol is a missile weapon with Strength 6 and a Range of 6. It takes one Turn to reload after it has been fired. The pistol comes with enough gunpowder and shot to last for for one Adventure. PERMANENT

event.name: Power Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Wizard from
event.rules: Bretonnian. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Power Stone of the Marquis. A Warrior using the Power Stone gets +1D6 to their Strength for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Quarg Foot Talisman
event.flavor: This curious talisman brings rare bouts of good fortune to its wearer.
event.rules: This talisman is worth 500 gold. (RPG: The power of this talisman can be invoked during a single stay at a Settlement. It allows the bearer to re-roll one Settllement Event per day, but they must accept the second result, even if it's worse. PERMANENT

event.name: Quarrels of Agony
event.flavor: The tips of these vicious quarrels are designed to cause as much injury as possible.
event.rules: A Warrior using these quarrels gets +1 To Hit. In addition, they cause Double Damage if the To Hit roll is a natural 6. There are 2D6 quarrels. Each quarrel may be used only once. DISCARD WHEN ALL USED

event.name: Rending Sword
event.flavor: The serrated points along the cutting edge of this blade grind and gnash together like teeth, tearing through armour, flesh and bone.
event.rules: This sword causes +2D6 Wounds. In addition, if the To Hit roll was a natural 5 or 6, the blow ignores 2 points of Armour. PERMANENT

event.name: Restore Flesh Scroll
event.flavor: Sprinkling a mixture of earth and water, the Warrior bearing the scroll casts a magical enchantment that reverts stone back to flesh.
event.rules: This spell may be cast on a single Warrior who has been turned to stone. The Warrior returns to normal but must roll 1D6. If the result is a 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6, then the Warrior suffers no lasting effects from the petrification. If the score is a 1, however, then the Warrior must deduct 1D3 from their Starting Wounds _ score permanently. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Right Gauntlet of Damzhar
event.flavor: This thick iron gauntlet is covered with studs in the shape of Dwarf runes.
event.rules: A Warrior who wears the Right Gauntlet of Damzhar gets +1 Strength, as well as +1 Attack with the weapon they hold in the gauntlet. If a Warrior wears both Gauntlets of Damzhar, they get a total of +2 Strength and +1 Attack for each weapon they wield (or +2 Attacks if holding a two-handed weapon). In addition, once per Adventure, they gain a special Gauntlet Attack that gets +1 To Hit and causes 4D6 Damage (do not add Strength to the score). PERMANENT

event.name: Ring of Cheshnakk
event.flavor: Cheshnakk was a great wizard from Araby whose expertise was the creation of exquisite flying carpets.
event.rules: The pinnacle of his achievement, however, was forging the Rings of Cheshnakk. On command, one of these rings can transport the bearer to safety. This exquisite and mysterious ring is worth 1000 gold. (RPG: While wearing this ring a Warrior may at any time leave the Dungeon and be transported to safety. They are out of this Adventure and meet the other Warriors at the next Settlement.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Ring of Immunity
event.flavor: This ring has two crystal hands clutching a gold nugget that emits a soft, warm glow.
event.rules: While a Warrior wears this ring, they may ignore the effects of any diseases they carry. (RPG: In addition, if the rules ever state that the bearer is affected by Paralysis, Petrify, Poison, or Fatal Damage, roll 1D6. If the score is a 5 or 6, the bearer is immune to the effects.) PERMANENT

event.name: Ring of Orion
event.flavor: This golden ring is said to be imbued with the power of Orion, the King of the Woods.
event.rules: The bearer of this ring gets +2 Strength. (RPG: If the bearer must ever subtract a point permanently from one of their Characteristics (due to Poison for example), it may be deducted from the ring instead. The ring now only gives the bearer +1 Strength and is worth only 250 gold. If the ring is used a second time, it is drained and becomes useless and worthless.) DISCARD WHEN DRAINED

event.name: Ring of Regeneration
event.flavor: This stone band holds the power of life itself, healing even the most grievous of wounds.
event.rules: At the end of any Turn in which the wearer of this ring has suffered Wounds, they may attempt to heal by regenerating with the ring. To do this, roll 1D6. If they are currently above zero Wounds, then on a score of 6 they have 2D6 Wounds restored. If they are on zero Wounds, then on a score of 6 they have 1D6 Wounds restored. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Ring of Seeking
event.flavor: This glittering ring is fashioned from a material that looks like quicksilver.
event.rules: When worn, the ring constantly shifts and changes like a shining, liquid-metal band. This ring allows the Warrior to attempt to avoid a trap they have just activated. Roll 1D6. On a score of 4, 5 or 6 the trap is magically disarmed and fails to work. PERMANENT

event.name: Ring of the Warp
event.flavor: This black ring constantly moves from finger to finger, blinking and shimmering with an unholy light. Instead of moving normally, the wearer may use the ring to teleport. They must declare that they are using the ring before they move. Roll 1D6. The result shows how many squares they may move by teleporting. The Warrior must move to an empty square. If there is no empty square, the Warrior must stay where they are and can do nothing for the rest of the Turn.
event.rules: When teleporting, the Warrior ignores any obstacles and automatically Escapes from Pinning. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Rockjaw's Axe
event.flavor: Rockjaw Sevenfingers was famous for eating stonebread and throwing axes. It is said that after he had this magical axe created, it took him three unfortunate attempts to master it.
event.rules: A Warrior wielding this axe gets +1 Strength. It can be used in hand-to-hand Combat or as a missile weapon. If thrown as a missile weapon the axe will return to the Warrior. After resolving the attack, roll 1D6. On a score of 3, 4, 5 or 6 the Warrior catches the axe safely. On a 1 or 2 the Warrior cuts themselves while catching the axe and suffer 1D6 Wounds with no modifiers for anything. PERMANENT

event.name: Ruby Chalice
event.flavor: This silver chalice is covered in tear-dropped shaped rubies.
event.rules: A Warrior may drink from this chalice any time during Combat. If they then suffer Wounds from a Monster for any reason, the Warrior immediately gets +1 Toughness. If they suffer Wounds again, the Warrior gets an additional +1 Toughness, and so on up to a maximum of +3 Toughness. The effects of the chalice last until the end of the Combat or until the Warrior is reduced to zero Wounds. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Rune of Annihilation
event.flavor: This stone has a Dwarf rune embossed upon its surface and is warm to the touch.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Annihilation into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Annihilation itself is permanent. If the To Hit roll with this weapon is a natural 6, the weapon causes +2D6 Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Rune of Restoration
event.flavor: This stone has a Dwarf rune embossed upon its surface and is warm to the touch.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the runestone burns a Rune of Restoration into the blade and then vanishes. The Rune of Restoration itself is permanent. A Warrior who wields this weapon automatically has 1 Wound restored at the end of each Turn. It fails to work while the bearer is on zero Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Sceptre of Zandri
event.flavor: The Sceptre of Zandri protects its wielder from the baneful gaze of the Undead, making them harder to hit.
event.rules: The Sceptre may be wielded like a weapon, and causes +1D6 Wounds against any Undead. In addition, any Undead attacking the wielder suffer -2 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Shield Scroll
event.flavor: Shouting words of power, the Warrior bearing the scroll is surrounded with a glowing screen of magical energy.
event.rules: When used, the Warrior bearing the scroll is immune to all attacks except those made with either a natural 6 To Hit or from spells (or similar magic) for one Turn. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Shield Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Shield Stone of the Marquis. A Warrior using the Shield Stone may ignore the effects of any one spell cast against them. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Shield of Ptolos
event.flavor: This shield throws a shimmering haze around its bearer, making them a difficult target in battle.
event.rules: A Warrior using this shield gets +2 Toughness. In addition, when drawing Warrior Counters to determine who has been hit by missile fire, the first time the bearer's counter is pulled out they may put it back and draw again. If it comes up a second time they are hit as normal. PERMANENT

event.name: Spear of Light Scroll
event.flavor: The Warrior hurls a spear of pure energy at their chosen victim.
event.rules: When used, any single Monster in the bearer's Line of Sight immediately suffers 4D6 Wounds. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Speed Stone of Le Marquis
event.flavor: Michel d'un Doigt (one finger) was a powerful Bretonnian
event.rules: Wizard. He laboured long to create a series of enchanted artefacts to be used by the chivalric knights of that realm. Unfortunately, the essential ingredient in the creation of each Was powdered bone from a human finger. Michel created nine in all... This is the fabled Speed Stone of the Marquis. A Warrior using the Speed Stone gets +2 Movement and may automatically Escape from Pinning for one Turn. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Spelleater Rune
event.flavor: This rune contains powerful spells of negation. Magic in the immediate vicinity arcs as the rune tries to pull it in and absorb it.
event.rules: When pressed into contact with any bladed weapon, the Spelleater Rune burns a copy of itself into the blade and then vanishes. The rune on the blade itself is permanent. Each time a spell is cast against the bearer of this weapon, roll 1D6. If the score is a 5 or 6, the spell has no effect on them (RPG: the wielder gets the Magic Resistance 5+ ability). USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Spirit Robe
event.flavor: This robe shimmers with an eerie dark purple glow.
event.rules: A Warrior wearing this robe becomes ethereal upon command. They may automatically Escape from Pinning and may move freely through other models and obstacles. Any attacks made with a non-magical weapon against the wearer suffer -1 To Hit. The effects last for one Turn. The Spirit Robe may not be worn with any helmet or armour. USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Staff of Command
event.flavor: This staff had runes of command burned into it many centuries ago.
event.rules: Once per Event the Wizard may use this staff to attempt to control any Monster on the Board. The attempt must be made as the Monsters appear. Roll 1D6. On a score of 5 or 6 the Wizard may choose one Monster and make it do whatever he wants for one Turn as long as the action does not cause it to harm itself. The Monster fights in the Warriors' Phase and if it kills another Monster, no one gets the gold. USE ONCE PER EVENT

event.name: Staff of Silencing
event.flavor: This staff was created by a mage to protect his village against the repeated attacks from Chaos Dwarfs.
event.rules: Any Chaos Dwarf Sorcerer who attempts to cast a spell while on the same Board Section as the wielder of this staff must roll 1D6. If the result is a 5 or 6, the spell has no effect. The staff can be used as a weapon, causing Damage as normal. If used against a Chaos Dwarf, the wielder gets +1 To Hit and causes +1D6 Wounds. PERMANENT

event.name: Super Supplement
event.flavor: The thin purple liquid in this vial can promote a strong vitality.
event.rules: A Warrior who drinks this liquid may add +1 to their Starting Wounds score permanently. If an Ex-Blood Bowl Player drinks it, he may add +1D3 to his Starting Wounds score permanently. USE ONCE THEN DISCARD

event.name: Surefire Bow
event.flavor: This elegant bow has a single Rune of Surefire carved on it.
event.rules: Ancient stories tell of a bow that never misses and this may be that very weapon... This bow is Strength 4. A Warrior using this bow gets +2 To Hit. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Avelorn
event.flavor: A dying High Elf Mage imbued this sword with a desire for vengeance against his killers.
event.rules: This sword causes Double Damage against Dark Elves (Triple Damage if the To Hit roll is a natural 6). Against any other opponent it causes only +1 Wound. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Destruction
event.flavor: This sword resonates with a deep hum and flickers with lightning.
event.rules: When drawn from its scabbard, this sword nullifies all magic within 1 square of the wielder. As long as the sword remains drawn, the wielder and any models in adjacent squares cannot use or benefit from any spells or other magic items. In addition, the sword causes +1 Wound (APG: and gives the bearer the Magic Dispel 6+ ability). PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Heroes
event.flavor: This sword shines with the undimming fire of righteousness - smiting down evil wherever it may be found.
event.rules: This sword causes an extra +3D6 Wounds when used against Monsters with a Toughness of 6 or more. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Hoeth
event.flavor: This sword was forged in Hoeth, in the realm of the High Elves. It is lightning fast and, once mastered, makes the wielder all but unstoppable in battle.
event.rules: When using this sword a Warrior must roll 1D6 each Turn. On a score of 5 or 6 they gain double their regular Attacks. On a score of 2, 3 or 4 they attack as normal. On a score of 1 the Warrior trips and falls over and may do nothing at all for the rest of the Turn. PERMANENT

event.name: Sword of Vengeance
event.flavor: This blade shines with a pure light and never dulls.
event.rules: Attacks made with this sword ignore Toughness and non- Magical Armour when determining Damage. In addition, once per Turn the wielder can re-roll one Attack with the sword that missed. PERMANENT USE ONCE PER TURN

event.name: Tablet of Adain
event.flavor: This stone table weighs surprisingly little and is covered in indecipherable hatchings and markings. This magical tablet is worth 1000 gold. (RPG: When used by a Wizard, the tablet allows them to re-roll any or all of his 'spell determining' dice each time he goes up a Battle-level (see New Spells in the Wizards' Training section).
event.rules: They may only re-roll each dice once and must take the result of the second roll, even if it is worse.) PERMANENT

event.name: Talisman of Jet
event.flavor: This glittering black jewel feels warm to the touch. This talisman allows a Wizard to exchange one of the spells he has learned for a new one.
event.rules: If he wants to exchange one of his spells, roll 1D6. On a score of 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6 he may exchange the spell he doesn't want for another of the same type. Select the new spell at random. (RPG: If he wishes to exchange one of his spells for another, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the talisman crumbles to dust and must be discarded. On a score of 2, 3, 4, 5 or 6 the Wizard may exchange one of his spells for one of the same Casting Number.) USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE

event.name: Talisman of Obsidian
event.flavor: This black talisman throbs dully with the rhythm of a pulsing wound. This talisman interferes with the powers of nearby spellcasters.
event.rules: Any spells cast by models adjacent to the bearer of the talisman fail on a 1D6 roll of 4, 5 or 6 and the Power used to cast the spell is redirected to restore 1D6 of the wearer's Wounds. If the wearer attempts to cast a spell, roll 1D6. On a score of 1 the spell fails. PERMANENT

event.name: Unyielding Blade
event.flavor: This immense blade was created by the High Elves of Ulthuan to defend against the constant raids from Naggaroth.
event.rules: Attacks made with this two-handed sword suffer -1 To Hit. In addition, roll 1D6 at the beginning of each Turn to see what other benefit it bestows: 1-4 +3 Toughness. 5-6 +4 Toughness. PERMANENT

event.name: Wand of Diabolum
event.flavor: This wand is pure white, shot through with streaks of diabolum, a bright red substance capable of harnessing magical energy.
event.rules: While using this wand, all of the Wizard's spells cost one less Power to cast. PERMANENT

event.name: Wand of Jade
event.flavor: This wand has strange icons engraved upon its surface. This wand increases the effect of any spell that involves rolling dice for its effects by adding +2 to the total. The Wand does not increase the chance of success, however. For example, if used to increase the effects of the Finger of Life spell, the spell still succeeds on a roll of 4, 5 or 6, but now heals 6, 7 or 8 Wounds (depending on the success roll).
event.rules: When found, the wand has 2D6 charges. Each use of the wand drains 1 charge. DISCARD WHEN DRAINED

event.name: Wand of Transmutation
event.flavor: A soft hum emanates from this mysterious wand. This wand contains spells that a Wizard may cast. Take 1D6 Starting Spell Cards not currently in play to represent the spells contained in the wand. The bearer may cast each spell once automatically at no Power Cost. (RPG: Once all the spells are used, the wand may be recharged at the Font of Power for 1D6x100 gold.
event.rules: Follow the rules above to see which spells are now stored in the wand.) USE THEN RECHARGE (From 'Rooftop Murder' Adventure) OM TREASURE

event.name: War Spear
event.flavor: This deceptively crude-looking spear can penetrate even the most robust armour. This spear may be used in hand-to-hand Combat or as a missile weapon up to 6 squares away. It ignores up to 2 points of non- magical Armour (1 point if the Armour is magical).
event.rules: If thrown, the spear also causes Double Damage if the To Hit roll is a 5 or 6. If may be retrieved at the end of the Combat. PERMANENT

event.name: Warningstone of Asuryan
event.flavor: This sky-blue jewel is said to be linked to the god Asuryan himself and imparts lightning-fast reactions to the wearer.
event.rules: When ambushed, the bearer rolls 1D6. On a score of 6, they sense the danger and warn the other Warriors, so the attackers do not get their Ambush Attack. The Warrior may try this once per Event which generates Monsters with the Ambush ability. USE ONCE PER EVENT

event.name: Warp Jump Spell Jewel
event.rules: When they use this arcane jewel, the Warriors vanish with a thundercrack. The jewel bearer and all adjacent Warriors are transported to anywhere in the Dungeon already explored, appearing in the same order as when they disappeared. If a Warrior who is transported is carrying the only light source, the remaining Warriors are Lost in the Dark and must roll on the Escaping the Dungeon Table. This also happens if Warriors transport without a light source. USE ONCE PER ADVENTURE
